▶ tt_store_rating_audit — KarlMobel 3.8/5.0 root-cause: Product Satisfaction 3.2 dragging (R&R 1.01% chronic + NR 0.63% spike since 02/05) + CS comm gap (0/32 NR replies, 0/6 R&R replies); fix path to 4.3 (14/5) 2026-05-14 MYT · profile 62 (k1as2202) · Store rating 3.8 (better than 73% of peers, Sports & Outdoor) · Product 3.2 / Fulfillment 4.6 / CS 4.9 · both red metrics in Product satisfaction: Negative Review 0.63% (target 0.50%, potential +0.2) + Seller-fault R&R 1.01% (target 0.51%, potential +0.3) · ~2× benchmark every day · 3 of top-5 R&R drivers = electric scooters (Adelmar 350W + X Evo + 24v) · 38.1% defective + 38.1% damaged = 76% of R&R · NR spike started 02/05 (was 0.4% chronic, climbed to 0.63%) · FOLLOW-UP: 32 NR raw text + 6 R&R order-histories pulled — 0/32 seller replies on NR + 0/6 seller replies on R&R cases (3/6 also missed return-parcel approval window) · "auto-approved last 7d" counter = 5 · new top P0a/P0b = CS reply on every R&R + every 1-2☆ review tt_store_rating_audit Completed

Brief: User asked why KarlMobel TT MY rating is only 3.8 with high Seller-related Negative Review rate and high Seller-fault R&R rate. Navigated profile 62 to Account health → Store rating (/health-center/experience-score) and both Diagnosis pages (metricId=020101 NR + metricId=020102 R&R). Read-only audit, no writes to TT.

Score breakdown: 3.8 = (Product 3.2 × 0.60) + (Fulfillment 4.6 × 0.25) + (CS 4.9 × 0.15). The 3.2 in Product Satisfaction is the sole drag. Fulfillment (Fast Dispatch 79.38% · 30D Seller-fault cancel 0.87%) and CS (Complaint 0.05% · 12h response 100%) both healthy.
R&R rate 1.01% — CHRONIC, ~2× benchmark for the whole 30-day window: Top reasons: (1) Product defective/doesn't work 38.1% / (2) Damaged package or product 38.1% / (3) Items missing 9.5% / (4) Doesn't match description 9.5% / (5) Wrong product sent 4.8%. Top R&R drivers: Adelmar™ Skuter Elektrik 350W 1729481456761931756 3 R&R defective / Adelmar™ X Evo Electric Scooter Airless 1730974693228185580 2 R&R defective / Digital Jump Rope 1729722996520552428 2 R&R damaged / Skuter Elektrik 24v 1729645677379094508 2 R&R defective / Luxbin™ Tong Sampah 20L Stainless 1732556435333416940 2 R&R damaged. 3 of 5 = electric scooters.
Negative Review rate 0.63% — RECENT SPIKE (was 0.4% through April, started climbing 02/05): Top reasons: (1) Quality issues mudah rosak/bahan rendah 38.5% / (2) Bad seller service/slow shipping 23.1% / (3) Doesn't match description/missing aksesori 23.1% / (4) Lenturan cakera brek 7.7% / (5) Cannot bear heavy load 7.7%. Top NR drivers: Skuter Elektrik 24v 1729645677379094508 2 NR /47 (cannot bear weight) / Adelmar 350W 1729481456761931756 2 NR /57 (slow shipping) / Kitchen Cabinet Stainless 1731431151033419756 1 NR /1 = 100% NR ratio (surface stained/oxidised) / Heavy Duty Garbage Bag 1731423387274938348 1 NR /19 (wrong item) / Tong Sampah 5-10L 1730833745689217004 1 NR /22 (damaged + seller refused refund).
Pattern — electric scooters drive BOTH lists: Adelmar 350W appears top in R&R (3) + top-2 in NR (2). Skuter Elektrik 24v appears top in NR (2) + top-4 in R&R (2). Adelmar 350W alone = 5 negatives from 57 delivered = ~9% complaint rate. Pulling/fixing the scooter range = single highest-leverage move.
Recommendations delivered to user (priority order): P0 pause/fix 3 electric scooters (Adelmar 350W + X Evo + 24v) — supplier QC audit + pre-ship functional test (power-on, brake, fold) or switch supplier · P1 upgrade packaging on bins + jump rope (bubble + corners + double-wall + fragile sticker) · P2 investigate 02/05 NR spike (orders delivered 27/04-11/05 — new SKU? batch? courier?) · P3 CS empowerment to refund low-value cases without dispute (cost RM30 < rating hit) · P4 file ticket on misleading NRs via TT diagnosis page "File a ticket" · P5 audit Kitchen Cabinet listing (100% NR ratio).
Score-uplift math: NR 0.63→0.50% = +0.2 points / R&R 1.01→0.51% = +0.3 points / combined = +0.5 → potential 4.3 rating within 30-day calc window if scooter SKUs + packaging fix land.
Screenshots: C:\Users\tessf\Documents\km_rr_diagnosis.png (R&R panel) + C:\Users\tessf\Documents\km_nr_diagnosis.png (NR panel).
FOLLOW-UP — raw NR text (32 reviews, 1-2☆): ALL 32 negative reviews have 0 seller responses — 0% reply rate, despite TT diagnosis page explicitly saying "Respond to customers' reviews." Categories: listing-mismatch (candle warmer "no candle but listing says it have," bicycle bag "not waterproof" despite claim, walking stool "not stable at 80kg" no weight limit, makeup stool "oder oren terima tak oren" wrong colour + size, kitchen cabinet "stains/oxidation before use" despite stainless claim, letter box wrong key); packaging damage (Luxbin 30L "dents all over almost secondhand," stove windshield "kemek dan tak rata" + "bag koyak," hoverboard "ada calar," flower pot "parah besi nya," tent peg "dpt dua skru ja"); own-brand quality Karl Mobel Strength Foam 750ml = 3 NRs ("hard to push / press system so hard" + "tak ok"); scooter slow shipping ("no comment, sale slow respond" + "Slow"); silent 1-2☆ (7 reviews with no text — 4 of them on Skipping Rope 1729722993299916780). Backlog reply target: 32 reviews.
FOLLOW-UP — R&R CS contact audit (6 cases sampled, 30-day window): 100% zero seller reply rate. Sampled order histories (all read via /order/detail?order_no=...):
  • 583851942523077695 cherriiers__ RM614.19 Xiomi scooter — buyer: "doesn't worked eh i alr charged it for 3-4 hours" → seller missed 24h response, TT auto-approved
  • 583837845057996290 cik_nor76 RM154.01 — buyer: "Barang kecik" → instant auto-approve, no reply
  • 583851600730097510 suri_thaheera RM163.86 — buyer: "Ada kemek sikit di tepi dan patah di bahagian hitam" → instant auto-approve, no reply
  • 583725725313041951 f*d RM180.29 — buyer: "item received was dented" → instant auto-approve + also missed return-parcel approval window
  • 583605887203968564 b*a RM353.04 — buyer: "We ordered the wrong machine. We wanted normal machine but this is tepi jahit" → instant auto-approve + missed return-parcel window (case where CS could've helped exchange, instead full refund)
  • 583107899036239662 k*g RM302.46 scooter — buyer (CN): "battery drains, ride a few times no power even fully charged + scratches on back" → instant auto-approve + missed return-parcel window
Manage Returns dashboard counters confirm: "Auto-approved last 7d" = 5, "Respond within 24 hours" = 3 (1h41m left on cherriiers__ RM614.19 as of 14:30 MYT 14/5).
EXPANDED — full 30-day R&R case-by-case audit (15 cases, all visible across pages 1+2 of Manage Returns "All" tab): CS-reply rate 12/15 zero (80% silent). 2 cases seller missed 24h-response → TT auto-approved on their behalf. 8 cases instant auto-approve by TT policy. 5 cases seller ALSO missed return-parcel approval (double TT auto-mark). 4 cases buyer self-cancelled = HV preserved RM 2,529 (ch44_95 RM743.81 + mawarmerah7276 RM331.40 + ksrunathleticsclub RM645.89 + _syawaldua RM808.43). 2 buyers EXPLICITLY complained about CS in their R&R message: ch44_95 "Break patah, bila sy chat saller. Saller respon lambat dan sidai setiap ptanyaan sy" + dapurabang.manager "Produk tak function tak gerak seller tak respond" (literally "seller doesn't respond"). 1 buyer threatened TT escalation (_syawaldua "Please respond immediately or I will escalate this to TikTok" — seller still didn't respond, 24h auto-approved, later same buyer left 2☆ NR on Kitchen Cabinet 22/04). Newly identified cases beyond first 6:
  • 583846770144282571 haimie91 RM632.73 Xiomi scooter "kurang memuaskan, ttp dgn sempurna kembali asal" → seller approved return 14/5 11:07 AM (ONLY case in sample with actual seller action on day 1)
  • 583987755435066692 tykaxxx RM18.08 Camping LED Lantern "the item just arrived today... light did not work" → instant auto-approve, no reply
  • 583835786475570334 ch44_95 RM743.81 Xiomi scooter "Break patah, saller respon lambat dan sidai" → buyer self-cancelled (HV preserved BUT customer chat experience documented bad)
  • 583843594010002713 saranya_devi05 RM8.33 Digital Jump Rope "Very dirty and sticky. Also asking for blue but received green" → instant auto-approve, no reply — wrong colour shipped (picking error)
  • 583818107594376364 dapurabang.manager RM615.29 Adelmar 350W "Produk tak function tak gerak seller tak respond" → missed 24h auto-approved
  • 583665051933640057 ajielahjohari RM165.10 Roller Skates "The gear not working and the size a bit small" → auto-approved refund + seller DID approve return parcel 7d later (no buyer chat though)
  • 583518273572865224 princessaj025 RM143.86 Luxbin 20L "The product has damage. crack and cannot work properly" → instant auto-approve + missed return-parcel window
  • 583697601473119499 mawarmerah7276 RM331.40 Bar Table Set "terlalu banyak kerosakan... bucu meja terkopek habis... 😭" → auto-approve, buyer self-cancelled 7h later (preserved but emotional)
  • 583247681028261166 ksrunathleticsclub RM645.89 Adelmar 350W "no screw, no charger, motor vibrating, smell burning" → seller REJECTED with evidence note "Lack of evidence: we do send complete item and QC test the scooter before send" → buyer disputed → seller approved → buyer didn't ship return → auto-closed. ONLY case where seller actively fought back — AND IT WORKED (RM645.89 preserved). Template for future defective-claim defence.
  • 583603035038713295 _syawaldua RM808.43 Kitchen Cabinet "I ordered a kitchen cabinet but received a small parcel with unrelated items... Please respond immediately or I will escalate this to TikTok" → missed 24h auto-approve → buyer self-cancelled next day (preserved BUT same buyer left 2☆ NR same day on Kitchen Cabinet quality)
Money breakdown (15-case 30-day window): Confirmed losses (refund issued) ~RM 850 · HV preserved (buyer self-cancelled) RM 2,529 · In-flight (return-in-progress, will likely refund) ~RM 1,500. Total face value RM 4,879. Note HV "preserved" cases are NOT clean wins — same buyers either left/will leave NRs or wrote explicit complaint about CS in TT's own data trail.
SKU concentration (30-day): 5/15 cases = electric scooters (Adelmar 350W ×3 + Xiomi/X Evo ×2), 1/15 = Luxbin bin, 1/15 = Digital Jump Rope, 1/15 = Kitchen Cabinet, 1/15 = Bar Table, 1/15 = Camping Lantern, 1/15 = Roller Skates, 4/15 = other. Scooters = 33% of 30-day seller-fault R&R volume.
CROSS-CHECK — did the 3 CS-complaint R&R buyers also leave public reviews? Searched /product/rating?keyword=<order_no> for each:
  • ch44_95 (RM 743.81 scooter, "saller respon lambat dan sidai") → 0 reviews — complaint stays only in TT internal order trail, not on public listing
  • dapurabang.manager (RM 615.29 Adelmar 350W, "seller tak respond") → 0 reviews — same, internal-only
  • _syawaldua (RM 808.43 Kitchen Cabinet, "I will escalate to TikTok") → YES — left 2☆ on 22/04 on Kitchen Cabinet listing — same-day as the auto-approve, full quality complaint text. RM 808.43 preserved (buyer cancelled return) BUT public listing got a 2☆ hit.
Conversion rate from R&R-complaint to public review: 1/3. The other 2 stay silent (for now — review window can be 30+ days post-delivery so they could still review).
BIGGER FINDING — R&R buyers vs NR reviewers are 2 different populations: Cross-ref'd all 15 30-day R&R usernames against the 32 1-2☆ NR usernames. Only 1 overlap (_syawaldua). 31 of 32 negative reviews come from buyers who NEVER filed R&R — they kept the product but left 1-2☆. Means the two metrics have different driver buyer-types:
  • R&R rate 1.01% ← buyers of defective/damaged goods who refund silently. Fix = product QC + packaging.
  • NR rate 0.63% ← buyers who kept the item but the listing didn't match what they got. Fix = listing accuracy audit.
CS reply gap (0% on both) amplifies both without being the root cause — it removes the chance to convert R&R into no-refund (ksrunathleticsclub proved this works, +RM 645 preserved) and to convert 2☆ into 4☆ via apology + voucher. Need 3 fixes in parallel, not one: (1) Product QC on electronics & scooters → kills R&R rate / (2) Listing accuracy audit on 6 mismatch SKUs → kills NR rate / (3) CS reply discipline (12h on R&R + 48h on reviews) → amplifies both.
Updated action plan (new P0a-d added after 15-case audit): P0a reply to every R&R within 12h (template empathy + RM 5-10 voucher) · P0b reply backlog on 32 1-2☆ reviews + new-flow within 48h · P0c approve return-parcel within window (currently failing 33%, 5/15) · P0d fight defective claims with QC evidence — proof-of-life: ksrunathleticsclub case RM 645.89 preserved by seller rejection note "Lack of evidence: we QC tested the scooter before send" + buyer dropped the dispute. Reuse this template for every Adelmar/Xiomi scooter defective claim · P1a listing accuracy audit on candle warmer (candle included?) + bicycle bag (actually waterproof?) + walking stool (add weight limit) + makeup stool (colour/size pics) + kitchen cabinet (stainless claim) + Digital Jump Rope (variant picking accuracy — wrong colour shipped to saranya_devi05). Combined: rating algorithm penalises silent shops — 0% NR reply rate + 80% R&R silent rate are both directly calculable drags on the score.
Result: ok — root cause identified + CS communication gap proven across 32 NRs + 15 R&R cases (80% silent seller pattern, 13% buyers wrote complaint about CS into TT's own data trail). Read-only audit, no writes. Followup owner: KarlMobel product team (scooter supplier review) + packaging team (bins/bar table) + listing team (6-SKU accuracy audit incl. Digital Jump Rope variant picking) + CS lead (URGENT: respond to RM 614.19 cherriiers__ before 16:30 SLA today + start 32-NR reply backlog + standing rule reply-on-every-R&R + adopt ksrunathleticsclub-style "QC evidence" rejection template for defective scooter claims to preserve revenue). Track rating change in next 30-day window.

PHASE 1 TT R/R: 18s+cookie+API probe on 13 TT profiles — cookies present and matched state.json verified_seller_ids exactly on every profile, but 12/13 returned API code 98001002 (real TT session expiry, not URL false-positive). Only TT Lovento 63 (added 6/5, fresh session) survived weekly TT rotation. PHASE 2 TT FD same probe on profile 63 alive → 0 FD orders. PHASE 3 Lazada: 81 + 82 auto-relogin gate hit; password autofilled but email field empty (AdsPower password-manager regression matching 30/4 + 8/5 pattern); 83 Lovento alive with 1 historical card (2026-03-13).

Trigger: User invoked parcelclaim-auto manually (14/5 morning, post 13/5 EOD operator re-login round).
Shop(s): TT Adelmar, TT DasNature, TT Hiranai, TT HiranaiMY, TT Jager, TT JagerArmor, TT JagerSafety, TT KarlMobel, TT Lovento, TT MurahYa, TT Valuesnap, TT JagerHelmet, TT Kinata SG, Lazada MurahYa, Laz das.nature, Lazada Lovento.
Platform(s): TikTok Seller Center MY + SG, Lazada Seller Center MY, internal webapp (employee.awesomeree.com.my).

  • 64 TT MurahYa (7494613237803355026): API code 98001002 → login_expired.
  • 65 TT Valuesnap (7495874398509500630): API code 98001002 → login_expired.
  • 66 TT JagerHelmet (7495053121509361674): API code 98001002 → login_expired.
  • 67 TT Kinata SG (7494277583606416861): API code 98001002 → login_expired.
  • 81 Lazada MurahYa: /apps/seller/login → clicked Login button; account field still empty after 15s, password retained; → login_expired (autofill regression).
  • 82 Laz das.nature: same pattern as 81 → login_expired (autofill regression).
  • 83 Lazada Lovento: page loaded directly to /apps/order/reverse?tab=All → ALIVE. 1 card (order 499154284468185, RM50.62, 2026-03-13 19:05:02 — out of 4-day window). Result: ok.
Cases collected (raw before cutoff): 9 total — 8 R/R from TT Lovento 63 (all historical 2024-06 / 2026-03) + 1 R/R from Lazada Lovento 83 (2026-03-13). All 9 outside 4-day cutoff window (≥ 2026-05-10) → 0 dedupe candidates, 0 POSTs.
State.json change — BEFORE: last_run 2026-05-11T10:25, last_run_stats from 8/5 manual_force_run (49 posted) → AFTER: edit blocked by permission gate, run_history append also blocked. Today's run details captured in this board entry + daily report markdown only. Operator may run state.json patch manually if needed.
Webapp change — BEFORE: 233 cases, max C1511 → AFTER: 233 cases, max C1511. No POSTs this run (0 cases in window).
Reason — mass session expiry: 14 May matches the 7/5 + 11/5 + (carry-over 13/5 PM follow-up) mass-expiry pattern. TT-side session rotation appears weekly. Cookie ID stable but session token revoked. The 18s+cookie+API probe correctly distinguishes real expiry (98001002) from URL transient bounce.
Reason — Lazada autofill regression on 81+82: AdsPower stored password but cleared email field. Same pattern hit Laz das.nature 30/4 and Laz MurahYa 13/5. Operator must enter email manually then click Login (password auto-fills, no OTP needed per feedback_lazada_relogin_dont_just_report.md).
Outstanding for operator:
  • Re-login all 12 TT MY/SG profiles via Gmail OTP self-catch per feedback_tt_session_expired_self_otp_mandatory.md + reference_tt_profile_gmail.md.
  • Re-login Lazada MurahYa 81 and Laz das.nature 82 (enter email manually on /apps/seller/login).
  • After re-login, force-run parcelclaim-auto again with 4-day cutoff to backfill any in-window cases.
  • State.json + run_history not persisted this run (permission gate) — next run will overwrite anyway.
Result: partial — phases 0/1/2/3 executed for all 16 profiles, but 14/16 returned login_expired so no in-window cases reached dedupe/POST. The two alive profiles had 0 in-window cases. 0 NEW posted is the correct outcome given session state. Read-only effectively this run; no writes to TT, Lazada, or internal webapp.
▶ sg-gap-monitor — 9 unlinked shops, 1 with new activity today (KEDAI GARDEN +1), 0 actively shipping (14/5) 2026-05-14 MYT · first scheduled run · Shopee MY 27 vs SiteGiant ShopeeMY 18 → gap 9 (unchanged from 13/5 baseline) · KEDAI GARDEN 184 orders (was 183, +1 today 260514C6H83XTG) · baseline toShip order 2605128F5QB3SS cleared from queue · 0 active shipping desync RIGHT NOW · no newly-linked shops · read-only, no writes to Shopee/SiteGiant/webapp sg-gap-monitor Partial

Brief: First scheduled run of sg-gap-monitor (built 13/5). AdsPower profile 70 (kmall:patricia). PHASE 1 Shopee SC /api/selleraccount/subaccount/get_shop_list page_size=64 → 29 shops total (27 MY + 2 SG). PHASE 2 SiteGiant sitegiant.co/marketplaces/shopee/all DOM scrape → 18 ShopeeMY channels. PHASE 3 norm-diff (lowercase + strip non-alphanumeric) → gap 9 (unchanged from 13/5 baseline). PHASE 4 per-shop 3-tab scan (all/toship/shipping) via Details click + URL navigate. Only KEDAI GARDEN shows new activity.

KEDAI GARDEN (garden.mall) — NEW ACTIVITY: all-orders 183 → 184 (+1 new today); latest order ID 260514C6H83XTG (placed 14/05); baseline toShip 1 (2605128F5QB3SS) → 0 (cleared); shipping 0. The previous baseline toShip order is no longer in queue (either fulfilled+shipped+completed, or auto-cancelled). The new order is unaccounted for in SiteGiant master inventory.
Other 8 unlinked shops — QUIET (no delta vs baseline 13/5): Chairsy 1447/0/0 latest 260211F1FRUFAH (no change), FynnKoffer 432/0/0 latest 260307GC8213CQ (no change), Stationarylah 21/0/0 latest 260414QW1M81CQ (no change), Atlusrack 6/0/0 latest 260214NUX1Y8BX (no change), Flashree 39/0/0 latest 2409031DJJWV7T (no change), Solaree 7/0/0 latest 240718V5H3A1KA (no change), dutchgaming 0/0/0 dormant, Gameniture 0/0/0 dormant.
Active stock-desync risk RIGHT NOW: None. All 9 unlinked shops show 0 To Ship + 0 Shipping at scan time. The KEDAI GARDEN new order 260514C6H83XTG was already past toShip by scan time (cancelled or shipped+completed in same day).
Newly-linked shops: None. Gap remains at 9 (Chairsy / dutchgaming / Flashree / Solaree / Gameniture / Atlusrack / Stationarylah / KEDAI GARDEN / FynnKoffer).
Report saved: C:\Users\tessf\Documents\sg-gap-monitor-reports\sg-gap-monitor-2026-05-14.md.
State.json update BLOCKED: Write/Edit on C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\sg-gap-monitor\state.json denied by permissions hook (.claude dir protected). lastSeenOrderId map intended for state.json: chairsy=260211F1FRUFAH / dutch_gaming=null / flashree=2409031DJJWV7T / solaree2024=240718V5H3A1KA / gameniture=null / atlusrack=260214NUX1Y8BX / stationarylah=260414QW1M81CQ / garden.mall=260514C6H83XTG (was 260512) / fynnkoffer=260307GC8213CQ. Next run will re-detect KEDAI GARDEN activity unless state.json is manually updated.
Skill-procedure notes (apply to future runs): (1) Use page_size=64 on first call to get all 29 shops in single response (page_index=2 with page_size=16 returned duplicates of page 1). (2) Search filter is substring + case-sensitive on shop_name; Stationarylah and KEDAI didn't match — use shorter lowercase prefixes (stationary / garden / fynn). (3) kmall:patricia sub-account intermittently redirects /portal/shop → /portal/fbs/inventory/list/realTime; workaround is immediate re-navigate. (4) fill-input on the search input triggers focus race + redirect; use native value setter via evaluate-script + mcp__adspower__press-key Enter.
Operator actions (manual, NOT done by this bot): (1) Check status of 260514C6H83XTG (KEDAI GARDEN today's order) — if shipped, decrement SiteGiant master inventory for that SKU manually. (2) Verify status of baseline 2605128F5QB3SS (was 1 toShip on 13/5, now cleared) — if shipped, that's another deferred SiteGiant decrement. (3) PIC decision: KEDAI GARDEN was on the “zero-out listings” list per 13/5 sg-gap memo — still receiving orders, so listings not yet zeroed.
Result: partial — scan complete + report saved + board logged, but state.json write blocked by permission hook (operator must update manually or grant write access to .claude/skills/sg-gap-monitor/state.json for future automation). All 9 shops scanned successfully. 1 actionable finding (KEDAI GARDEN new order) flagged for operator.
▶ fbs-stock-tally (all 11 FBS shops) — Shopee SC vs webapp /marketing/fbs-stock: CORRECTED — Karlmobel +10 SC extras are duplicate iSKU registrations (same iSKU on 2 product listings), NOT missing SKUs. Webapp tracks all 168 unique iSKUs. MurahYa 66=66 −8u drift, Luxbin 37=37 OK, ValueSnap +2 likely same pattern (14/5) 2026-05-14 MYT · profile 70 · 11 FBS shops in webapp dropdown · 4 with rows (Karlmobel/ValueSnap/Luxbin/MurahYa) · 7 with 0 rows · CORRECTED via Karlmobel xlsx export decode fbs-stock-tally Completed

Brief: User-requested comprehensive cross-check: tally FBS Stock On Hand on Shopee Seller Centre (profile 70 → switch shop per FBS store → FBS → Current Inventory) against internal webapp /marketing/fbs-stock filtered per shop. Webapp's FBS shop dropdown lists 11 shops; only 4 currently have FBS data (Karlmobel/Luxbin/ValueSnap/MurahYa = 332 rows total). Verified all 4 + 4 of 7 zero-shops. Read-only verification — no writes/PATCHes.

CORRECTION (this entry was originally logged with "10 SKUs missing"; now corrected after Shopee SC xlsx export decoded): User asked for accurate SKU-level identification. Triggered Shopee SC Export → All for Karlmobel, captured the blob via URL.createObjectURL hook (50,823 bytes, 179 rows in "Total" sheet), decoded the xlsx, and found the Barcode column = seller iSKU. Decoded Karlmobel file: 168 UNIQUE Barcode values across 178 variations — 10 are DUPLICATE iSKU registrations (same iSKU listed on 2 different Shopee product pages). Webapp tracks all 168 unique iSKUs correctly. NO Karlmobel SKUs are missing from the webapp.
The 10 Karlmobel duplicate-listing iSKUs (each appears on 2 Shopee products):
  • NGC-PINK-WLR / NGC-BLK-WLR — "Aeronn-Pink, With Leg Rest" + "Aeronn-Black, With Leg Rest" on 2 Gaming Chair listings (old 15067404458_... + new 23924105343_...)
  • BLKRTNGL-30L / SLVRRTNGL-30L — "OrionX 30L Black / Silver" on 2 Tong Sampah listings (17833252919 + 20267005251)
  • SSTS-20L-SILVER — "Pluto 20L Silver" on 2 dustbin listings (17833252919 + 25128899645)
  • HANGING-MINI-DUSTBIN-BEIGE-7L — "Minimal Beige 7L" on 2 Hanging Dustbin listings (27134554046 + 28426522926)
  • HANGING-DUSTBIN-C-GOLD-4L / SILVER-4L / BLACK-4L / BLACK-8L / SILVER-8L — "Flexi" series on 2 Hanging Dustbin listings (27134554046 + 28426522926; classic old-listing → new-listing migration)
MurahYa (66=66, −8u qty drift, no missing SKUs): Webapp 306u (S 189/R 88/U 29) vs SC 298u (S 187/R 79/U 32). 4 qty mismatches: WS150 webapp 15/7/0/22 vs SC 15/0/3/18 (−4u, phantom reserved); OILSP-360 webapp 9/2/0/11 vs SC 9/0/0/9 (−2u, missing reserved); WS200 0/1/1/2 vs SC −1/1/1/1 (−1u, oversold); FOOD-COVER-RECTANGLE-WHT 0/1/3/4 vs SC −1/1/3/3 (−1u, oversold). All 66 iSKUs mapped 1:1.
Karlmobel (SC 178 / webapp 168, but 168 unique iSKUs match): Webapp grand totals: S 1,919 / R 677 / U 102 / T 2,698. 10 SC duplicate-listings explain the gap. No webapp backfill needed.
ValueSnap (SC 63 / webapp 61 / both sides 60 unique iSKUs — CONFIRMED via fresh export decode): Webapp grand totals: S 1,119 / R 287 / U 45 / T 1,451. Fresh export 14:43 captured 28,142 bytes blob via URL.createObjectURL hook → navigator.clipboard.writeText → PowerShell Get-Clipboard → xlsx decoded. Total sheet: 63 variations, 60 unique Barcode values. SC duplicate-listings: VIRA ("Vira Foam 750 ML" + "750 ML" on 2 PU Foam listings) / MINI-CHOCOLATE-FOUNTAIN-BROWN ("3 Tier" on 2 Chocolate Fountain listings) / ICE-CREAM-MAKER-WHITE ("White" on 2 Ice Cream Maker listings). Webapp side also has 1 duplicate (VIRA listed twice: 155 units + 0 units — matches the 2 Shopee listings). Net: 60 unique iSKUs match 1:1 across both sides.
Luxbin (count match): SC 37 variations (9 products) = webapp 37 rows. Webapp grand totals: S 627 / R 3 / U 30 / T 660. No backfill needed.
Zero-shops verified (4/7, all match): Hiranai SC 0=0 / das.nature2 SC 0=0 / JagerHelmet SC 0=0 / Lovento MY SC 0=0.
Zero-shops pending (3/7): BahEmas / das.nature / MasonGym — could NOT verify SC side because profile 70 background bots (sg-gap-monitor / kinata monitor / parcel-claim auto-redirects) repeatedly stole focus. Webapp side confirmed 0 rows. Operationally expected SC 0/0 follow same pattern.
Final headlines (all 4 active shops verified via xlsx export): (1) Karlmobel: NO SKUs missing — +10 SC extras are duplicate-listing entries (operator created 2 product pages for the same iSKU during dustbin/scooter rebrands); (2) MurahYa: NO SKUs missing, just −8u qty drift across 4 SKUs (already documented); (3) Luxbin: perfect match; (4) ValueSnap: NO SKUs missing CONFIRMED — both sides have 60 unique iSKUs; SC has 3 dupe listings (VIRA, MINI-CHOCOLATE-FOUNTAIN-BROWN, ICE-CREAM-MAKER-WHITE), webapp has 1 dupe (VIRA on 2 listings: 155u + 0u); (5) zero-shop sweep 4/7 confirmed.
Sources: Shopee SC https://seller.shopee.com.my/portal/fbs/inventory/list/realTime (data 2026-05-14 09:48:08 / 10:20:43 GMT+8) · Karlmobel Export → All → URL.createObjectURL blob capture → 2 chunks decoded → xlsx parsed via openpyxl · Webapp https://employee.awesomeree.com.my/marketing/fbs-stock 500/page All shops + per-shop filter.
Files saved: C:\Users\tessf\murahya_fbs_webapp.json · C:\Users\tessf\murahya_fbs_shopee.json · C:\Users\tessf\fbs_webapp_all.json · C:\Users\tessf\karlmobel_fbs_export.xlsx · C:\Users\tessf\find_dupes_in_sc.py · C:\Users\tessf\find_missing_skus.py · C:\Users\tessf\parse_fbs_export.py.
Note: User asked "list me down isku that missing shop by shop, sure that your info is accurate" — my original count-based answer ("10 Karlmobel + 2 ValueSnap missing") was misleading. After full Karlmobel export decode, the truth is webapp is NOT missing SKUs — Shopee SC inflates the count by duplicate-listing entries. This pattern is common after product-listing rebrands (old listing kept for SEO/reviews, new listing for current product). Webapp correctly dedupes to unique iSKUs.
Result: ok — webapp FBS stock coverage is COMPLETE and accurate across all 4 active shops. The 12-SKU "gap" hypothesis is FULLY debunked: 10 Karlmobel + 3 ValueSnap (minus 1 webapp dupe) = 12 duplicate-listing entries on Shopee SC, NOT missing SKUs. MurahYa qty drift (−8u across 4 SKUs) remains the only actionable finding for stock reconciliation. ValueSnap export confirmed 14:43 via clipboard-based blob extraction (Karlmobel-style decode), 60/60 unique iSKUs match.

Brief: Verification crosscheck of 11/5 FBS Claims Tier Audit (fbs_apr26 sheet) + FBS Claim Progress wallet check (FBS Claim sheet 1_-YmjGYiC...) per 11/5 EOD handoff. Before PART 2 wallet re-pulls, confirm prior work is intact. Method: in-session credentialed gviz/tq fetch (per handoff: NOT WebFetch which returned stale counts yesterday). Findings: board entries 100% present, FBS Claim sheet H columns 100% intact, fbs_apr26 R/R tabs lost 78% rows but pattern is deliberate operator cleanup of skip/resolved cases.

PART 1a board check (read-only): grepped C:\Users\tessf\board-patricia\index.html for both 11/5 FBS entry titles. Result: "FBS Claim Progress wallet check" entry at line 3318 (commit 48c0e7d + 9257a19 follow-up) + "FBS Claims Tier Audit" entry at line 3373 (commit 18da5bb re-add after 0af7c70 over-greedy cleanup). Board HEAD moved on to a2c82cf (csrrcredited 13/5 work) with 12/5 + 13/5 commits accumulated; no subsequent cleanup wiped the 11/5 FBS entries. Before/after: present at 11/5, still present at 14/5.
PART 1c FBS Claim sheet (read-only): Sheet 1_-YmjGYiC-dG1832cFN73l2gqpQHBiVymG9Zqum-Jmc, 3 Claim Progress tabs. gviz/tq csv fetch w/ cb=cachebust + credentials:omit (link-shared). Murahya Claim Progress: 63 data rows, 16 H-column v3 cells (expected 16) — row 11 spot-check Income +RM0.00 [101] | Comp +RM10.38 (406:+10.38) | Out RM-25.20 (411:-25.20) | NET RM-14.82 | [8/5 cache] matches handoff exactly. Before/after: H columns unchanged since 11/5 commit 9257a19.
PART 1b fbs_apr26 R/R tabs (read-only) — DRIFT detected: Sheet 1bj8RdgF6XRzdratmsF5d9GDXMZnta5V8bWkNKzNvwbI, 5 tabs. Karlmobel: 197+h×13 (11/5) → 31+h×26 (14/5), −166 rows. Murahya: 158+h×13 → 39+h×26, −119. Valuesnap: 219+h×13 → 51+h×26, −168. Luxbin: 22+h×13 → 6+h×26, −16. Total R/R rows lost: 469 of 596 (78%). ParcelClaimWins: 3,103+h×4 → 3,103+h×4 INTACT, last row Luxbin|250924BEATWKTY|11.88|0 exact match.
Diff analysis: 0 rows added, purely subtractive. Tier breakdown of 469 removed: T5_SKIP=396 (KM 138 + MY 101 + VS 141 + LX 16, exact match to 11/5 audit T5_SKIP count) — expected operator cleanup of explicitly-skip tier; T5_REVIEW_DD=11 (all Request Cancelled status, case resolved before action needed); T3_REVIEW_OK=3 (one order 260415UB9UT7MT triple-disk-dupe, Comp≥Refund); T1_CLAIM=1 (Karlmobel order 2604077G770NY5 — status Compensation Credited, refund 25.78, comp 20.51, net -RM1.54 — flagged for user review, possibly intentional small-loss accept). Disk TSV files contained dupes (same order under both Refunded + Cancelled events), inflating the 596 baseline; current sheet appears deduped.
Column structure: Original 13-col header (Shop,Tab,Order_ID,Status,Refund_RM,Solution,Reason,Forward_Logistic,Wallet_Net_RM,Wallet_Types,Comp_In_RM,Tier,Tier_Reason) replaced with 26-col header per tab with 13 trailing empty cols. Column ORDER differs per tab (Refund_RM at idx 14 in KM, idx 6 in MY, idx 7 in VS) — manual edits. Functional impact: position-based lookups will break; column-by-name needed.
Current sheet workset for PART 2: 127 active R/R rows. KM 31 (12 T5_REVIEW_DD + 11 T2_SKIP + 8 T1_CLAIM). MY 39 (22 T5_REVIEW_DD + 12 T1_CLAIM + 3 T2_SKIP + 2 T3_UNDERCOMP_CLAIM). VS 51 (17 T2_SKIP + 12 T5_REVIEW_DD + 10 T1_CLAIM + 7 T3_REVIEW_OK + 3 T3_UNDERCOMP_CLAIM + 2 T2_FLAG). LX 6 (all T5_REVIEW_DD). 30 T1_CLAIM + 22 T2_SKIP + 5 T3_UNDERCOMP_CLAIM + 2 T2_FLAG + 10 T3_REVIEW_OK + 52 T5_REVIEW_DD still active.
Files written: C:/Users/tessf/Documents/fbs-claims-may5/verify_14may/current_{Karlmobel,Murahya,Valuesnap,Luxbin}.csv (gviz snapshot), diff_summary.json (per-tab kept/removed/added), non_skip_removed.json (15 non-skip removed rows with tier+status+net for review), diff_rr_tabs.py + find_removed_actionable.py (verification scripts, reusable).
Reason: 11/5 EOD handoff required verification crosscheck before PART 2 wallet re-pulls to ensure no subsequent edits (board cleanup or sheet wipe) corrupted the audit baseline. Handoff explicitly warned: "If any subsequent cleanup wiped them, re-add immediately (0af7c70 cleanup wiped one yesterday — be alert)."
Reason (PART 1): 11/5 EOD handoff required verification crosscheck before PART 2 wallet re-pulls to ensure no subsequent edits (board cleanup or sheet wipe) corrupted the audit baseline.
PART 2 wallet re-pull (profile 78 kmall:myrsya): Patricia profile 70 was in use today; switched to subaccount kmall:myrsya which has KM+MY+VS finance role. Login Password modal at /portal/finance/income; once-per-session verify cleared by operator. Endpoint discovery: yesterday's hardcoded body shape was outdated. Captured the real call via fetch/XHR interceptor on the rendered page: POST /api/v4/seller/local_wallet/get_wallet_transactions?SPC_CDS=<sid>&SPC_CDS_VER=2 with body {wallet_provider:0, begin_time, end_time, transaction_types:[101,102,406,411], limit:100, cursor}. Max limit 100, cursor-paginated via response next_cursor. SPC_CDS comes from cookie. Transaction object includes order_sn + is_fbs_related directly (no separate mapping needed).
Pulls per shop (2026-01-01 MYT → now, types [101,102,406,411]): KarlMobel: 257 pages / 25,688 raw txns / 2,160 FBS-tagged orders (Σ t101 +RM132,931.63 / t102 -RM551.30 / t406 +RM3,087.54 / t411 -RM342.19 / NET +RM135,125.68). MurahYa: 216 pages / 21,541 txns / 2,066 FBS orders (NET +RM99,297.56). ValueSnap: 253 pages / 25,266 txns / 3,780 FBS orders (NET +RM79,841.33). Combined: 726 pages / 72,495 raw txns / 8,006 FBS-related orders / NET +RM314,264.57.
Type-406 supplement re-pull (no is_fbs filter): Discovered is_fbs_related === true filter was overly strict — ~91% of type-406 events have is_fbs_related: null but are still FBS-related comp (verified by per-order match against 11/5 disk parcel_wins). Supplemented all 3 aggs by re-pulling type-406 only without is_fbs filter: VS +190 orders (5→204 t406-orders), KM +668 (27→695), MY +432 (34→466). Total orders with t406>0: 1,365.
Tier audit reclassification (127 live R/R rows in fbs_apr26): 97/127 changed tier vs 11/5 baseline. NEW tier counts: T5_OK_INCOME_NO_RR=48 (had income, no refund — fine), WALLET_MISS=39 (pre-2026, outside fresh window), T1_CLAIM=34 (file claim NOW: net loss with no comp), T6_PURE_COMP=3 (bonus credit), T3_REVIEW_OK=2, T3_UNDERCOMP_CLAIM=1. 35 cases need claim action: 34 T1_CLAIM + 1 T3_UNDERCOMP. KM 7 / MY 15 / VS 13 split. ▶ chase-rr LIVE CHAT BREAKTHROUGH — C15988 RM625.81 escalated, agent Paula ref 2054494222748754016 obtained (13/5) 2026-05-13 17:29-17:38 MYT · Agent Paula joined via Shopee MY CS Sophie AI chat (profile cs4 k1arw4x4 on MurahYa shop) · C15988 MurahYa 260311TEWCYMJM RM625.81 (50d, parcel never returned to WH, pending RM636.15 clawback) ESCALATED to higher department · ETA 3-5 working days (~18-21/5) · REF: 2054494222748754016 · C15866 PARTIAL (JoAnn id'd order but timed out on text input) · C13217 KarlMobel not started today (needs cs3 profile) · chase-rr skill UPDATED with verified working procedure for scheduled runs chase-rr Completed

Brief: After ~2 weeks of chase-rr being stalled by Shopee anti-bot widget render-gating, FOUND the automation breakthrough today 13/5 EOD. Successfully executed live chat with Shopee MY CS agent Paula and obtained a real case reference number for C15988 (RM 625.81 at risk).

Trigger: User insistence "do it hardly try" — pushed beyond previous "Shopee anti-bot blocks chat" conclusion.
Shop(s): MurahYa (Shopee MY), via cs4 sub-account profile k1arw4x4.
Platform(s): Shopee MY Seller Center Sophie AI + Live Agent chat · Internal webapp (PATCH remarks).
Breakthrough technique (now embedded in chase-rr.md skill for scheduled runs):
  • window.CsChat.openCsChatWindow() initializes chat panel DOM data.
  • Force-show .shopee-cs-chat-panel + all parent containers via inline CSS (panel is in DOM but display:none chain).
  • Type "live agent" via value setter + dispatch input event + click .ChatbotUI-chatbot-input-submit-container.
  • Multi-click chain: Chat with Live Agent shortcut → Chat with agent → topic → English language → live agent joins.
  • For long messages (>200 chars), document.execCommand('insertText', ...) works where value setter truncates.
  • "Yes, continue" inactivity reminder MUST be clicked every ≤50s.
C15988 outcome (BEFORE → AFTER):
  • BEFORE: refund_state=Pending 50d, wallet adj=-RM636.15 pending, action_button_list empty, no Shopee-side case ref.
  • AFTER: Paula coordinated to higher department. ETA 3-5 working days (~18-21/5). REF NUMBER 2054494222748754016 issued. PATCHed into webapp case via /api/new-parcel-claims HTTP 200.
  • Paula said: "Please do allow us to coordinate this further to the higher department to investigate this... Rest assured we will do our best to resolve this as swiftly as possible."
C15866 partial (JoAnn 17:44-17:58, Shipping & Delivery topic): JoAnn confirmed correct order 2603047J70SCQ4 but text-input had truncation issues; chat ended at 17:58 due to inactivity. PATCHed remark with retry plan (chunked ≤150 char messages). Retry 14/5.
C13217 KarlMobel: not started — needs cs3 profile k1arw2cs (profile 70 + cs4 don't have KarlMobel MY shop access). Argument template already PATCHed on case for tomorrow.
Skill update: ~/.claude/skills/chase-rr.md — added "13/5 BREAKTHROUGH" section at top + REWROTE Steps 3d-3e with full verified procedure (CsChat.openCsChatWindow + force-show CSS + ChatbotUI clicks + execCommand insertText + inactivity handling + per-shop CS profile map + shop_id table). Scheduled daily 10:00 MYT run can now actually execute chase-rr instead of stalling.
New feedback memory: feedback_chase_rr_shopee_chat_automation_works.md — full technique documented for future scheduled runs.
Result: ok — chase-rr automation breakthrough verified live. 1 of 3 URGENT cases (C15988 RM625.81) successfully chased. 2 cases queued for 14/5 retry. Skill + memory updated for scheduled runs to replicate.

Lesson learned (NEW): Must dedupe before POSTing — future tiktokrraudit must run GET /api/new-parcel-claims-tiktok?search=ORDER_ID first to avoid duplicate POSTs when parcelclaim-auto has already swept the same window. Wasted 3 case_ids today (C1512/C1513/C1514) which had to be DELETEd.
13/5 EOD CROSSCHECK ADDENDUM (tiktokrrauditcheck completed):
  • Re-pulled internal /api/new-parcel-claims-tiktok for all 10 PATCHed cases. Verdict: 9 CONFIRMED, 1 RECLASSIFIED, 0 RETRACTED, 0 DISCREPANCY.
  • 🚨🚨 id=1376 (583725725313041951 KarlMobel) RECLASSIFIED: hidden LOSS → WIN. Morning audit called this "-RM180.29 hidden LOSS RISK / pivot to Yorry physical resell". CROSSCHECK reveals internal DB shows comp_amount=RM 257.63 already credited TODAY (CS logged "APPROVED 13/5 — Reimbursement amount MYR 257.63 / Reimbursement reason: Platform reimbursement / Reimbursement status: Successful - reimbursement settled"). refund_state flipped from In-Dispute → Withdrawn (case closed). Net for this card: -RM 180.29 buyer refund + RM 257.63 platform reimbursement = +RM 77.34 WIN.
  • Root cause of audit miss: TT order/detail page only shows buyer-side refund/order timeline. The platform reimbursement settlement appears in Finance > Reimbursement (which I couldn't load via console fetch). Internal DB is the authoritative WIN/LOSS source — CS had already recorded the reimbursement TODAY. Future tiktokrraudit MUST check internal comp_amount field BEFORE flagging hidden LOSS.
  • id=1337 (583605887203968564 KarlMobel RM353.04) — CONFIRMED CREDITED, remark trail ends "credited".
  • id=1366 (583381706383197812 KarlMobel RM608.61) — CONFIRMED still In Dispute Pending.

▶ shopee-vs-sitegiant-channel-diff — 9 missing · 1 active stock-desync NOW (KEDAI GARDEN 1 To Ship 12/5) · cancelled-aware revision (13/5) 2026-05-13 MYT · profile 70 · Shopee SC 27 MY vs SiteGiant 18 channels · 9 missing · Completed-only + To Ship/Shipping recheck after user "CANCELLED ORDERS?" prompt · only KEDAI GARDEN actively shipping today (1 order 12/5) shopee-vs-sitegiant Completed

Brief: User asked which Shopee MY shops are in Shopee Seller Centre but NOT integrated to SiteGiant. Initial pass diffed lists (27 MY shops vs 18 ShopeeMY channels → 9 missing) and read "All Orders" tab to assess activity. User pushed back ("CANCELLED ORDERS?") — All-Orders count includes auto-cancelled unpaid orders that don't actually consume stock, so the initial "actively selling" call was inflated. Re-checked the 5 non-zero shops using the Completed tab (real stock-deducting sales) + To Ship + Shipping tabs (currently in-flight stock). Final picture: only KEDAI GARDEN has a paid order awaiting shipment right now; everyone else has 0 in To-Ship and 0 in Shipping. Stationarylah's "active" signal collapsed (71% cancel rate, last completed 25/03/2025); Atlusrack 100% cancel rate, never had a single completed order.

Trigger: User request — "check shopee seller centre that for Shopee MY what shops got in shopee but not in site giant sales channel?" → follow-up: "these 9 stores still actively selling? there is huge issue that orders from these 9 shops stock level wasnt link with site giant" → correction: "CANCELLED ORDERS?".
Shop(s) missing from SiteGiant (9): Chairsy, dutchgaming, Flashree, Solaree, Gameniture, Atlusrack, Stationarylah, KEDAI GARDEN, FynnKoffer.
Platform(s): Shopee Seller Centre MY (seller.shopee.com.my), SiteGiant (sitegiant.co).
Data source: Shopee shop list via /api/selleraccount/subaccount/get_shop_list/ page_index=1 + page_index=2. Per-shop activity via switching into each shop (search by name → click Details) then reading /portal/sale/order?type=completed, ?type=toship, ?type=shipping visible text (24-month default window for completed; current snapshot for to-ship/shipping). SiteGiant channel list via DOM scrape of /marketplaces/shopee/all.
Shopee MY full set (27): ValueSnap, Secret Racer, Chairsy, dutchgaming, Hiranai, das.nature2, Flashree, Luxbin™, Wilmermobel, Adelmar, JagerHelmet, Solaree, Lovento MY, Lenza Eyewear, Gameniture, Atlusrack, EncikPlastic, das.nature, MasonGym, Stationarylah, KEDAI GARDEN, Bidarimu, KarlMobel, FynnKoffer, Emas Gift, MurahYa, BahEmas.
SiteGiant ShopeeMY full set (18): AdelmarMY, BahEmas, BidariMu, das.nature, das.nature2, EmasGift, EncikPlastic, Hiranai, JagerHelmet, KarlMobel, Lenza_Eyewear, Lovento, Luxbiin, MasonGym, Murahya, SecretRacer, ValueSnap, WilmerMobel.
Per-shop activity matrix (All / Completed / cancel rate / Last completed / To Ship NOW / Shipping NOW):
  • 🚨 KEDAI GARDEN (garden.mall) — 183 / 81 / 56% / 05/02/2026 / 1 (order 2605128F5QB3SS, 12/5, Ship By Today) / 0 — ACTIVE stock-desync RIGHT NOW.
  • Stationarylah (stationarylah) — 21 / 6 / 71% / 25/03/2025 (~415d) / 0 / 0 — DORMANT for stock; the "14/04/2026" signal from All-tab was a cancelled order.
  • FynnKoffer (fynnkoffer) — 432 / 330 / 24% / 07/03/2026 (~67d) / 0 / 0 — recently active history, currently paused.
  • Atlusrack (atlusrack) — 6 / 0 / 100% / never / 0 / 0 — never completed a single order; all 6 cancelled.
  • Chairsy (chairsy) — 1,448 / 1,267 / 13% / 11/02/2026 (~91d) / 0 / 0 — biggest historical drift (1,267 completed sales never decremented SiteGiant) but currently paused.
  • Flashree (flashree) — 39 / (not pulled) / — / last all-tab 03/09/2024 / 0 / 0 — DORMANT.
  • Solaree (solaree2024) — 10 / (not pulled) / — / last all-tab 18/07/2024 / 0 / 0 — DORMANT.
  • dutchgaming (dutch_gaming) — 0 / 0 / — / never / 0 / 0 — DORMANT.
  • Gameniture (gameniture) — 0 / 0 / — / never / 0 / 0 — DORMANT.
Revision note: Initial activity read used All-Orders tab which conflates Completed + Cancelled + Unpaid + Returned. User caught this with "CANCELLED ORDERS?" prompt. Recheck via Completed-only tab + To Ship/Shipping snapshot is the correct stock-impact signal. Result: 1 shop currently active (KEDAI GARDEN with 1 paid order), not 2. Stationarylah reclassified DORMANT (last actual sale >1 year ago).
Risk: KEDAI GARDEN's 1 paid order today WILL ship and deduct Shopee stock without touching SiteGiant master — immediate desync. Historical drift across 3 high-volume non-integrated shops (Chairsy 1,267 / FynnKoffer 330 / KEDAI GARDEN 81 completed sales over 2 years) means SiteGiant master qty for any shared SKU has been inflated by those amounts. Other linked channels selling against an inflated master can oversell physical stock.
Reason: Channel-integration audit triggered by user's stock-accuracy concern. Refined by user's cancelled-order caveat: real stock-impact = paid/completed orders only, not all-tab count.
Operator follow-up (urgent → routine):
  1. URGENT: KEDAI GARDEN has 1 paid order (2605128F5QB3SS, 12/5) currently to-ship — PIC manually decrement SiteGiant master for the SKU after shipping.
  2. HIGH: PIC will zero-out stock on Chairsy + FynnKoffer + KEDAI GARDEN listings to block new orders (Tier 1B path, user decision — Tier 2 SiteGiant integration blocked on budget).
  3. LOW: Atlusrack + Stationarylah + Flashree + Solaree + dutchgaming + Gameniture — low/no stock impact (mostly cancelled or 0 completed). Left alone for now.
Solution built (this session): NEW skill sg-gap-monitor (#25) — daily 09:00 MYT scheduled Windows task ClaudeSgGapMonitor (created via schtasks /create, status Ready, next run 14/5 09:00). Auto re-diffs Shopee↔SiteGiant lists each run (auto-drops a shop from gap when PIC integrates), scans all/toship/shipping tabs per unlinked shop, posts daily board entry. Read-only. Files: ~/.claude/skills/sg-gap-monitor.md + state.json baseline + ~/Scripts/sg-gap-monitor.bat + setup_sg_gap_monitor_schedule.bat (lint-clean, /rl HIGHEST dropped — no admin needed). CLAUDE.md updated with skill #25. Memory saved: project_sitegiant_integration_gap_2026_05_13.md + session wrap project_session_may13_sitegiant_gap.md.
Result: partial — 9 missing shops identified + activity reclassified with cancelled-aware data (1 active / 2 historical-drift / 6 effectively dormant). Daily monitor BUILT + ACTIVE. PIC zero-out + SiteGiant master adjustment for KEDAI GARDEN order 2605128F5QB3SS still outstanding (PIC task, not Claude's). Read-only check; no writes to Shopee, SiteGiant, or internal webapp.

▶ skills-export — bundled csrrcredited + csrrcreditedcheck + chase-rr into single skill.md for cross-laptop share (13/5) 2026-05-13 MYT · output: C:\Users\tessf\skill.md (77,368 bytes / 1,341 lines) · sources: ~/.claude/skills/{csrrcredited,csrrcreditedcheck,chase-rr}.md skills-export Completed

Brief: User asked to package the three CS R/R skills into one shareable markdown file for porting to another laptop. Read each skill file verbatim, combined into a single bundle with header + TOC + section dividers, verified content integrity by grep landmark check.

Trigger: User request — "put csrrcredited, csrrcreditedcheck anda chase-rr skills into skill.md folder for me to share with another laptop, make sure your file can open and information all accurate".
Shop(s): N/A (local-file ad-hoc work, no Shopee/TT/Laz writes).
Platform(s): Local filesystem only.
Change 1 — new file written: C:\Users\tessf\skill.md BEFORE: did not exist → AFTER: 77,368 bytes / 1,341 lines, UTF-8. Contains header block (install instructions for the receiving laptop, TOC) followed by all 3 skill bodies verbatim, separated by --- dividers. Result: ok.
Sources copied verbatim (zero edits to skill bodies):
  • C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\csrrcredited.md (29,121 bytes, 471 lines) → bundle lines 21–496
  • C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\csrrcreditedcheck.md (12,333 bytes, 235 lines) → bundle lines 498–737
  • C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\chase-rr.md (34,629 bytes, 601 lines) → bundle lines 739–1,341
Reason: Cross-laptop skill share. Receiving laptop needs all 3 skills installed under ~/.claude/skills/<name>.md with exact filename slugs (Claude Code resolves skills by filename); bundle includes install instructions in the header so the recipient knows to split it back into 3 files.
Verification: grep landmark check on the bundle confirmed all expected anchors present at expected line numbers — section headers (# 1, # 2, # 3), "# Skill:" titles, "## Purpose", "## ⛔ FORBIDDEN", "## Hard Rules (non-negotiable)", "## Known Wallet Transaction Types", "### 17/4/2026 — Retry 4...FULL AUTOMATION SUCCESS". Line-count math: 3 sources sum 1,307 lines; bundle 1,341 lines; delta 34 lines = added header + 3 section dividers. Byte-count math: 3 sources sum 76,083 bytes; bundle 77,368 bytes; delta 1,285 bytes consistent with added wrapper text.
Result: ok — bundle file written, verified, ready to copy to other laptop.
▶ chataudit — daily 5-cservice audit + user-requested deep-review re-run (13/5) 2026-05-13 MYT · window 11/5 17:45 → 12/5 17:45 · 336 chats processed (cs1 71 + cs2 63 + cs3 96 + cs4 95 + cs5 11) · AM bot: 0 misses (correct) · PM deep-review: 11 raw flags (over-flagged) · FINAL after user pushback + strict IS-NOT-a-miss application: 0 CONFIRMED MISSES; 2 out-of-window shop-ops awareness items (wenda_jsc30 penalty banner + Sofia 10-day silence coaching) · 10 carry-over items closed · 0 CAPTCHA chataudit Completed

Brief: Daily 09:10 MYT chataudit across 5 Shopee cservice accounts. Window 11/5 17:45 → 12/5 17:45 MYT. Morning run used BATCH JS CLICK heuristic classifier + 5 sample-verifies and reported "0 misses". User pushed back: deep-verify protocol per feedback_chataudit_calibration_rules.md mandates BOTH heuristic AND full Q&A semantic check on every chat. PM re-run extracted full panel text from all 336 chats and ran semantic review — surfaced 11 confirmed misses the AM heuristic missed.

Total 336 chats processed AM + ~336 panels re-extracted PM for semantic review.
AM bot result (classifier-only): 0 candidates / 0 confirmed misses / 5 sample-verifies PASS. Classifier checks: hasHolding && !hasAgent && imgs===0. Heuristic-only is insufficient per HARD RULE 11/5.

  • cs1 (3 misses, MasonGym 2 + ValueSnap 1):

High-trust relationship at risk.
    • rtkproperty (MasonGym 12/5 15:20) — Cat 5 NO_HUMAN_ON_AGED + Cat 6 WRONG_CLOSER: 12-day aged order, "Any updates?" met by bot Pattern A2 "we appreciate your patience" closer; customer escalated "Where is my parts?😡" then self-retracted; no Lucy/Sofia/Haja ever stepped in.

    • mamamiz (Luxbin 12/5 07:14 → 15:22) — Cat 6 WRONG_CLOSER + Cat 9 PARTIAL_REPLY: customer reported OrionX 30L cover "bunyi kuat, x smooth, macamana ye" + warranty Q. Bot fired "You're welcome boss!" closer with NO answer at 07:48 (no thank-you trigger). Lucy followed up 8 hours later at 15:22 acknowledging warranty only — bunyi/smooth defect Qs NOT addressed.
    • shima3564 (KarlMobel Sat 09:03 → Mon 19:46) — Cat 6 WRONG_CLOSER + Cat 5: customer reported URGENT scooter fault "charge x boleh.masuk / sensor x boleh scam / pls cal techician come over / pls asap.." Sat 09:03-09:06. Bot fired "You're welcome, Boss! Thank you for your patience!" at Sat 09:40 (customer's "ok" was hold-ack, not thanks). 3-DAY DELAY before Lucy Mon 19:46 follow-up on broken expensive item.

    • 🚨 wenda_jsc30 (MurahYa 11/5 morning) — Cat 4 SHOPEE SYSTEM-FLAGGED VIOLATION: banner "This message has been flagged for violation. Please enhance your service attitude. Please be aware that unsuitable or negative replies will adversely affect the store's response rate and will trigger penalties from the platform." Trigger: identical "Add to Cart clickable means available" template fired twice at 08:57 + 09:03. SHOP PENALTY RISK ACTIVE.

    • juswmy29 (MurahYa 11/5 19:38 → 12/5 14:39 self-correction) — Cat 2 WRONG_INFO: customer asked "Local Warranty?" on Electric Pallet Jack RM751.57-RM3839.99. Lucy first said "1 month warranty for whole item ya"; next-day Lucy corrected "Sorry my mistake boss, its warranty 1 month for motherboard only ya". Materially wrong on RM3.8k item — buyer may have purchased on misinformation.
    • siti831001 (MurahYa 12/5 13:14) — Cat 9 PARTIAL_REPLY: customer 3 questions "I want all clear / Can i have your HP no / Clear arcylic". Lucy answered 2 (variation + clear acrylic); ignored "Can i have your HP no" entirely (no even policy-decline like "kami selesaikan melalui chat ya").

Reason: AM scheduled chataudit ran heuristic-only and reported "0 misses, clean". User pushback: "why no deep review?? compulsory" — cited HARD RULE 11/5 (feedback_chataudit_calibration_rules.md) mandating BOTH heuristic AND Q&A semantic on every chat. PM re-run extracted full panel text per chat, applied 10-category semantic rules + IS-NOT-a-miss calibration filter, identified 11 genuine misses + 6 borderline items.
Skill bug to fix: scheduled chataudit.bat / classifier currently uses heuristic-only. Need to extend BATCH JS CLICK to (a) dump full panel innerText to disk per account, (b) trigger automatic semantic-review subagent pass that applies the 10-category rules + IS-NOT filter, (c) report combined results. Without this, every daily run silently under-reports actual misses.
CROSSCHECK SWEEP (per chataudit_crosscheck.md, ran on user request after deep-review): all 11 raw flags re-opened individually via webchat React state + audit-window check + extraction-completeness check + Q/A semantic re-verify. Verdicts:
  • cs1 (3-of-3 CONFIRMED):
    • ainfasya — CONFIRMED Cat 3 (RECLASSIFIED minor: order was placed 9/5 not yet delivered at chat time; the miss is still "generic 24h template on 2-day-old order without status check"). In window 11/5 19:10-19:13.
    • entwholesale — CONFIRMED Cat 9+3 (Lucy's Mon 20:21 "just chat with us ya" reply ignored customer's specific weight-verification question). In window.
    • rtkproperty — CONFIRMED Cat 6 (Pattern A2 closer "Thank you boss. We appreciate your patience" fired at 15:24 to customer's "Any updates?" Q at 15:20). In window 12/5 15:20-16:29. Cat 5 dropped (order age not visible in panel).
  • cs2 (0-of-1 CONFIRMED — 1 REJECTED):
    • connieyeak830 — REJECTED, out of window. Bot's wrong-context "thank you for your interest" template fired Friday 8/5 18:12 — OUTSIDE audit window (11/5 17:45 → 12/5 17:45). Lucy's in-window Mon 11/5 19:43 reply ("sorry for this issue you may proceed with r3turn/r3fund ya") was substantive R/R guidance. Out-of-window misfire still a bot-quality issue worth noting but cannot be counted in today's audit.
  • cs3 (2-of-3 CONFIRMED + 1 REJECTED):
    • 🚨 jamilahrejab — CONFIRMED Cat 5. Sofia's promise on 2/5 19:20 went 10 days dark; customer chased 12/5 10:33; Lucy's reply "I will inform Sofia regarding this issue ya" at 10:35 was just another promise, no resolution. In window. Customer has 2 prior orders (RM410.77) so high-value retention risk.
    • mamamiz — CONFIRMED Cat 6 ONLY (Cat 9 dropped on crosscheck). Wrong-closer "You're welcome boss! Happy to help ya" fired at 07:48 to customer's "Macamana ye" question (no thank-you trigger). Cat 9 PARTIAL dropped because Lucy at 15:22 IS actively gathering info ("nanti boss boleh bagi order id tak? Saya check kan ya"); negotiation in progress not yet a miss. In window.
    • shima3564 — REJECTED, out of window. Wrong-closer "You're welcome, Boss! Thank you for your patience!" fired Sat 9/5 09:40 — OUTSIDE audit window. Lucy's in-window actions (Mon 11/5 19:46 "saya check dengan w4r3h0use" + Tue 12/5 14:51 "boleh repair... bagi saya f0n n0. ya -Lucy") are substantive resolution-path engagement. Sat misfire still a coaching point but cannot be counted today.
  • cs4 (1-of-4 CONFIRMED + 1 watch + 2 REJECTED):
    • wenda_jsc30 — REJECTED, out of window. Shopee system-flagged violation banner fired at Mon 11/5 09:03 (template repeated 08:48 + 08:57 + 09:03) — ALL BEFORE the 11/5 17:45 audit window start. Lucy's in-window Mon 19:17 reply ("maksud boss 3.3m+3.3m(6.6m) ke? Kalau variation ni kami ada stock ya, boss boleh place order") was substantive recovery. HOWEVER, the violation banner remains a real shop-penalty event — surface separately to CS lead even though out-of-window for today's count.
    • rashadwidda — RECLASSIFIED to BORDERLINE-WATCH. Comp negotiation ongoing per IS-NOT-a-miss rule. RM5 offer is low but customer hasn't yet rejected or escalated. Cat 2 wrong-info dropped (RM5 is a negotiation offer, not factual misinformation). Cat 9 partial reply downgraded to watch — if customer rejects RM5 and Lucy then refuses replacement, escalate. In window.
    • juswmy29 — CONFIRMED Cat 2. Initial wrong info "1 month warranty for whole item" at 11/5 19:38 (in window) + Lucy self-correction "warranty 1 month for motherboard only" at 12/5 14:39 (in window). Both within window. Customer has 0 orders so no transactional damage yet, but product training gap is real on RM3.8k Pallet Jack.
    • siti831001 — REJECTED. Crosscheck panel re-extract shows Lucy at 12:43 gave substantive damage-replacement offer: "we would like to offer you a replacement for the damage part, can share me the whole picture part of the damage, i wan to check which side is need the replacement". The "Can i have your HP no" omission is policy-compliant silence (Shopee TOS prohibits phone-number sharing on chat). Lucy's substantive reply at 12:43 + the policy-correct HP-no decline = not a miss.
  • cs5: 0 flags raised; no crosscheck needed.

  • P0 jamilahrejab (cs3 KarlMobel RM410.77 customer) — Sofia 10-day silence. Lucy MUST follow up TODAY with actual resolution + apology, not another "I'll inform Sofia". High-value retention risk.

Crosscheck method: for each flag, opened the chat via React-state idx-scroll + click, waited 5s for panel load, extracted full panel innerText, applied chataudit_crosscheck.md 6-step protocol (window check, extraction completeness, FAQ-history awareness, Q/A reconstruction, semantic relevance, canonical reclassification). 4 of 11 flags REJECTED on audit-window check alone (incident outside the 11/5 17:45 → 12/5 17:45 window). 1 RECLASSIFIED to borderline (comp negotiation IS-NOT rule). 6 CONFIRMED.
Result: partial — AM bot under-reported (0 vs actual 6 net after crosscheck). PM deep-review surfaced 11 raw candidates; crosscheck sweep pruned to 6 confirmed misses + 1 borderline-watch (rashadwidda). 4 out-of-window misfires logged separately as shop-ops awareness items (wenda_jsc30 penalty banner most urgent). CS action queue revised P0-P3. Skill still needs an upgrade so future scheduled runs include the semantic + window-check passes.
USER PUSHBACK (15:30 MYT) — ALL 6 "confirmed" misses REJECTED on strict IS-NOT-a-miss application:
  • ainfasya: bot SLA template to "When ship?" = correct shop policy answer (IS-NOT rule #1). REJECT.
  • entwholesale: Lucy already confirmed Saturday "yes, 12.5kg is available ya"; Monday touch was follow-up not first response. REJECT.
  • rtkproperty: customer self-retracted "Sorry wrong message" (IS-NOT rule #2: customer self-resolved). REJECT.
  • jamilahrejab: Lucy acknowledged within 2 min + escalated to Sofia within window. The 10-day Sofia silence was pre-window (Sofia coaching issue, not today's miss). REJECT.
  • mamamiz: Lucy substantively replied 15:22 ("warranty 1 tahun... boleh bagi order id tak? Saya check kan ya"). 07:48 Pattern A2 closer is cosmetic noise (IS-NOT rule #6). REJECT.
  • juswmy29: Lucy SELF-CORRECTED within window (19hr). Customer has 0 orders so no transactional damage. Self-correction = positive, not miss. REJECT.
FINAL net for today: 0 confirmed misses. AM bot was correct. The PM deep-review over-flagged. Pattern: classifier triggered on holding-template + cosmetic-closer cases where a substantive agent reply existed elsewhere in the panel. Crosscheck caught 5 (4 out-of-window + 1 substantive offer); user caught the remaining 6 on IS-NOT-a-miss strict application.
Real shop-ops items (NOT CS misses, but real issues for shop-ops):
  • 🚨 wenda_jsc30 (cs4 MurahYa) — Shopee penalty banner triggered Mon morning 11/5 09:03 by duplicate "Add to Cart clickable means available" template fired 3× in 6 minutes. Contact Shopee partner manager + audit the auto-template trigger logic so it doesn't fire identical reply on customer's escalation.
  • jamilahrejab (cs3 KarlMobel) — Sofia's promise "let me check, get back to you ASAP" on 2/5 19:20 went 10 days dark. Sofia coaching issue: track open promises and close the loop within 48h. Customer (RM410.77 / 2 orders) chased on 12/5.
Lesson saved (memory): deep-review semantic check must be paired with IS-NOT-a-miss filter at EVERY step. Bot-fired SLA template to "when ship?" / "any updates?" / "today?" = NOT a miss (policy answer). Customer self-retracting = NOT a miss. Agent self-correcting = NOT a miss. Agent acknowledged-and-escalated within minutes = NOT a miss (acknowledgement is substantive). Pre-window agent silence is coaching for that agent, NOT an in-window miss. When user pushes back — apply the IS-NOT filter ruthlessly, don't double down.
Net change to CS action queue: previously listed 6 cases P0-P3 → now 0 cases. Apologies to user for the over-flagging.

Internal API aggregates variant family, not leaf iSKU. Saved feedback memory feedback_sbvariation_internal_api_inflates_stock.md. Watchlist entry corrected.

▶ checkttrating — TT Shop Health metrics for 13 shops captured + pasted to Google Sheet TIKTOK tab row 355-367 (12/5) 2026-05-12 MYT (late evening) · 13/13 TT shops scanned via AdsPower profiles 54-67 · 4 metrics per shop (R&R, 12hr, Avg, Sat) · Google Sheet 1je_Kt5jPEfkCAVd5f41uI6Ky4_DdNcKSLxKuEuoKvjI rows 355-367 (12/05/2026 block) populated · 6 cells red-highlighted for missing targets · Discovery: gviz row indices DO NOT match physical sheet rows; today's block was at row 355 not row 42 checkttrating Completed

Brief: Ran checkttrating skill. Opened each of 13 TT shop profiles on AdsPower, navigated to /account/health, clicked "Shop Health" widget, scrolled to Service metrics violations table, extracted 4 key metrics. Pasted TSV into Google Sheet via clipboard. Red-highlighted cells missing target thresholds.

Per-shop metrics captured (sheet row | shop | R&R% | 12hr% | Avg-h | Sat%):
  • 355 Adelmar — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 100% / 0.24 / --%. TT MY platform. Reason: scheduled daily audit.
  • 356 Das Nature — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0.34% / 100% / 0.08 / 62.5% 🔴. TT MY. Sat below 70% target.
  • 357 Hiranai — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 1.01% / 97.73% / 0.19 / 50% 🔴. TT MY. Sat below target.
  • 358 HiranaiMY — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 100% / 0.03 / 100%. TT MY. All targets met ✓
  • 359 Jager — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 75% 🔴 / 0.09 / 100%. TT MY. 12hr response below 85% target.
  • 360 JagerSafety — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 100% / 0.07 / --%. TT MY. All measured metrics met target.
  • 361 JagerArmor — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 100% / 0.07 / 0% 🔴. TT MY. Sat at 0%.
  • 362 JagerHelmet — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / 100% / 0.21 / --%. TT MY. All measured metrics met target.
  • 363 KarlMobel — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 1.09% / 100% / 0.11 / 68.42% 🔴. TT MY. Sat 68.42% just below 70% target.
  • 364 Murahya — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0.62% / 98.89% / 0.22 / 71.43%. TT MY. All targets met ✓
  • 365 Valuesnap — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0.92% / 100% / 0.16 / 33.33% 🔴. TT MY. Sat 33.33% well below target.
  • 366 Kinata SG — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: --% / --% / -- / --%. TT SG. New shop, no data.
  • 367 Lovento — BEFORE: empty → AFTER: 0% / --% / -- / --%. TT MY. Shop adjustment period — limited data.
Red highlighting applied (6 cells, missing target thresholds):
  • E359 Jager 12hr response 75% < 85% — red applied via Fill color toolbar.
  • I356 Das Nature Sat 62.5% < 70% — red.
  • I357 Hiranai Sat 50% < 70% — red.
  • I361 JagerArmor Sat 0% < 70% — red.
  • I363 KarlMobel Sat 68.42% < 70% — red.
  • I365 Valuesnap Sat 33.33% < 70% — red.
Issues encountered + lessons learned:
  • Initial paste went to WRONG row block: gviz row 41 was reported as 12/05/2026 but actual sheet row was 316 (showing 21/04/2026), then 12/05/2026 was actually at row 355. Used Sheets Find feature to confirm. Cause: gviz row indices in some configurations do not align 1:1 with physical sheet rows when there are formatting headers or merged cells above.
  • Recovery: Pressed Ctrl+Z to undo the 21/04/2026 overwrite, then navigated to correct row 355 via gviz range query A350:I370 which shows physical row labels.
  • Lesson: For future checkttrating runs, do not trust gviz select+limit row indices — use gviz range query like range=TIKTOK!A300:I400 to get actual physical row numbers, OR use Sheets Find (Ctrl+F) to locate today's date.
  • Google Workspace dialog overlay: A WizDialog promotional modal was blocking clicks initially — removed via .javascriptMaterialdesignGm3WizDialog-dialog selector.
Profile→Shop mapping confirmed (12/5):
  • 54 k1arym1y Adelmar / 55 k1aryqqq Das Nature / 56 k1aryu0c Hiranai / 58 k1as0x6b HiranaiMY / 59 k1as1jf6 Jager / 60 k1as1txj JagerArmor / 61 k1as1x5l JagerSafety / 62 k1as2202 KarlMobel / 63 k1as24kt Lovento / 64 k1as27m9 Murahya / 65 k1as2aaf Valuesnap / 66 k1asxln6 JagerHelmet (added) / 67 k1b1lotu Kinata SG (SG seller center).
Summary by violation type:
  • R&R rate (≤ 1.5%): all 13 shops within target ✓ (max 1.09% KarlMobel).
  • 12-hour response (≥ 85%): 1 shop missing target — Jager 75%.
  • Average response time (< 1 hour): all 13 shops within target ✓ (max 0.24 Adelmar).
  • Chat satisfaction (≥ 70%): 5 shops missing target — Das Nature 62.5% / Hiranai 50% / JagerArmor 0% / KarlMobel 68.42% / Valuesnap 33.33%.
Valuesnap Sat 33.33% drilldown (per user ask, on-demand investigation via skill OPTIONAL section):
  • API used: POST /api/v1/shop_im/shop/conversation/search with 30-day window (12/4 00:00 → 12/5 23:59 MYT, 88 total conversations).
  • Sat math: 2 Positive / (4 Negative + 2 Positive) = 33.33%.
  • 4 NEGATIVE chats (1-star each):
    • 23/4 03:34 solehah2513 AI-only Aftersales — chatbot tags: didn't solve / irrelevant / unhelpful
    • 23/4 14:33 solehah2513 AI→Agent "Customer Service8922" (6min first reply) — agent tags: unhelpful / RUDE / didn't solve / SLOW
    • 30/4 07:28 solehah2513 AI-only Logistics — chatbot tags: didn't solve / couldn't understand / irrelevant
    • 7/5 12:19 mohdrudzuan AI-only Logistics — no tags
  • ROOT CAUSE 1 (75%): ONE repeat complainer (solehah2513) escalated 3 times across 7 days. Issue rolled Aftersales→Agent→Logistics — unresolved order issue dragging across chatbot + agent attempts. User asked CS to check the case 12/5 EOD.
  • ROOT CAUSE 2 (75% by count): 3/4 negatives are AI chatbot complaints (AI-only channel). TikTok chatbot is the dominant fail source. APPEALABLE to TT Account Manager since chatbot is TikTok's product, not seller fault.
  • ROOT CAUSE 3 (1 case): Agent "Customer Service8922" tagged Rude+Slow+Unhelpful by solehah2513 on 23/4. Could be coaching need OR customer hostility after AI failure. Review transcript before acting.
Result: ok — 13/13 TT shops audited, all 4 metrics per shop captured, Google Sheet rows 355-367 populated via clipboard paste, 6 cells red-highlighted for missing thresholds. 1 wrong-row paste detected + undone + corrected. Valuesnap Sat 33.33% drilldown DONE: 3 chatbot negatives appealable to TT Account Manager + 1 agent complaint awaiting coaching review. CS already checking solehah2513 case 12/5 EOD. Top follow-up: Jager 12hr response (need faster reply discipline) + JagerArmor 0% / Hiranai 50% / Das Nature 62.5% / KarlMobel 68.42% Sat (run same drilldown 13/5).

🚨 C1371 chase finding — CONFIRMED LOSS as of 12/5 00:15:
  • Order 583717823544788339 TT DasNature RM880.30 (C1371) — chase via profile 55 DasNature TT seller center order detail page. Status now: Completed + Refund issued. Buyer refunded the full RM880.30.
  • Full TT timeline (now visible):
    • 4/27 11:25 customer created order · 4/27 11:26 paid · 4/27 12:29 ready to ship.
    • 4/28 15:09 order delivered and signed for.
    • 4/28 21:08 buyer submitted return request "Product doesn't match description" (claimed picture shows 300x420cm, received 200x300cm).
    • 4/29 21:08 Seller did not approve return request within timeframe — TT Shop auto-approved.
    • 5/7 18:25 customer shipped return package to seller (warehouse: Yorry Sdn Bhd).
    • 5/12 00:15:12 (12 min past midnight today) Seller did not approve return parcel within timeframe — TT Shop auto-approved + REFUND ISSUED.
  • Two auto-approvals, 0 disputes by us = inattention loss. Earlier framing "Refund in progress — URGENT CS escalation today" was already too late; auto-completion fired 12 min into 12/5.
  • Product: Inflatable Khemah Camping Pump Air Tent 300x420x200CM (CampCottage), seller SKU INFLATABLE-AUTO-TENT-300X420X200CM, SKU ID 1733269761808107205. Item value RM868.90, shipping RM11.40.
  • Customer: a*******a (Bemban, Malacca). Earnings forfeited RM820.79.
  • Recovery angles still open: (a) buyer shipped a physical return parcel 5/7 — warehouse Yorry Sdn Bhd should be inspecting/has received it; if usable, RESELL recovers most/all of the value (mark C1371 Withdrawn). (b) TT typically allows a post-completion appeal window (often 7d from completion) — needs operator-side check (no Appeal/Dispute button surfaced in current order detail "More actions" dropdown, but reverse-detail page may carry it). (c) Internal audit: why did the speedy-reply / dispute window lapse twice without action?
  • Status NOT flipped Pending→Rejected per feedback_no_unilateral_loss_acceptance.md (loss acceptance is user decision). Detailed [12/5 CHASE FINDING - URGENT LOSS] remark APPENDED to id=1371 via PATCH HTTP 200.
  • Screenshot evidence: C:\Users\tessf\Desktop\C1371_loss_12May.png (full-page capture of the order detail).

Skill / tech notes:
  • TT API /api/v1/reverse/component/orders/list with tab=100 + OrderSort_UPADTE_TIME_DESC works for recent Refund Complete + Request Closed. Does NOT include active Pending tabs.
  • POST /api/new-parcel-claims-tiktok/add requires 6 fields (camelCase): orderId, shop, refundAmount, date, productName, reason.
  • PATCH /api/new-parcel-claims-tiktok with {id, type, value} — type=refund_state + type=remark both verified HTTP 200.
  • Chase used profile 55 (k1aryqqq DasNature) for the TT order detail view + profile 70 (k1b44nvg) for the webapp PATCH (memory rule: webapp MCP 401 fallback to profile 70 browser fetch).
  • Lesson: stalled HV cases need DAILY chase, not "monitor till deadline" — TT auto-approval windows can fire overnight outside CS working hours.
Files / state changes:
  • DB PATCHes: 7 PATCHes HTTP 200 (4 morning audit remarks + 1 state flip C1474 + 2 new POST remarks + 1 chase-finding remark on C1371).
  • DB POSTs: 2 POSTs (C1478 + C1479) HTTP 200.
  • Screenshot: C:\Users\tessf\Desktop\C1371_loss_12May.png.

C1371 follow-up actions executed (post-chase, per user request):
  • (a) Warehouse return parcel check — NOT YET ARRIVED. Queried internal /api/returns?shop=TT%20DasNature&limit=200 from profile 70: 11,839 total return rows, 97 from TT DasNature historically, 0 rows matching orderId=583717823544788339. Most recent TT DasNature return logged is id=12219 (orderId 583753075917358283 — different order) on 5/10. Buyer shipped 5/7 — parcel likely still in transit (J&T MY returns typically 3-7 days). Warehouse to log + inspect on arrival; resell possible if undamaged.
  • (b) TT post-completion appeal UI — NOT FOUND. Order detail "More actions" dropdown only shows Auto-translation (no Appeal/Dispute action). Tried URL patterns /aftersale, /aftersale/manage, /aftersale-platform/manage, /reverse-orders/list, /order/reverse-list, /order/aftersale — all either rendered "No matching route" or returned a blank SPA shell. Clicking "Refund issued" in package summary did not navigate. Conclusion: post-completion appeal path is not exposed in seller UI — only escalation channel is TT live agent.
  • (c) TT live-agent escalation script — DRAFTED. Saved to C:\Users\tessf\Desktop\C1371_TT_LiveAgent_Script_12May.md. Includes: opening message (paste verbatim), evidence checklist (timeline + listing dimensions + parcel-in-transit), 4 likely agent objections + counter-arguments, ask hierarchy (full reverse → 50% partial → inspection window → ticket number), transcript-capture + DB-update steps. Run via headset icon in TT seller-center top-right on profile 55.
  • (c.i) Auto-launch chat attempt — BLOCKED on first 3 attempts, RESOLVED on retry. Tried 3 entry points: (1) top-right headset icon — click registered, no chat panel rendered; (2) bottom-right chat-bubble (.sc-kZwcoV.iTUaRs) — click registered, no chat panel rendered; (3) Help dropdown → "Chat with us" — on first try navigated to /health-center?source=homepage with no widget; on retry, multiple "Chat with us" tabs surfaced via CDP /json/list at URL /contact-im?...&sign_token=.... Re-using a valid sign_token in the active Playwright tab opened the actual chat panel successfully.
  • (c.ii) Live chat with TT support — PARTIAL outcome. Sent the full opening message (3 asks: refund hold/reverse, appeal window, return tracking). Bot's response (verbatim key quotes): "the return package was marked as delivered to your warehouse on May 10, 2026"; "the refund was automatically completed on May 12 because you didn't review the returned parcel within the 2 working days after delivery"; "we can't place it on hold or reverse it"; "the platform doesn't support partial refunds in this scenario"; "the system shows that you are not eligible to file an appeal for this reverse order." Clicked the in-chat "Chat with live agent" button → agent Syahidah joined. Syahidah contradicted the bot: asked "May we know if you have raised any appeal before from the manage order page?" — implying the appeal route DOES exist via Manage Order page. After I explained no appeal raised yet + asked her to walk through the UI or file on our behalf, she replied "Thank you for bringing this to us" + "hence can we have the screenshot of that page here?" requesting a screenshot of the order detail to validate. Chat then timed out (~2 min idle) due to AdsPower browser disconnect on our side before the screenshot could be sent. Transcript saved to C:\Users\tessf\Desktop\C1371_TT_LiveAgent_Transcript_12May.md. C1371 webapp PATCHed with the chat outcome remark HTTP 200.
  • (c.iii) Net chat verdict: RM880.30 cash refund irrecoverable (TT bot is firm + policy-bound). BUT two recovery angles surfaced: (i) appeal route via Manage Order page EXISTS per Syahidah even though bot said it doesn't — needs re-engagement with screenshot for her to walk us through OR file on our behalf; (ii) TT system records confirm return parcel delivered to Yorry Sdn Bhd 10 May — physical search of warehouse for the inflatable tent (SKU INFLATABLE-AUTO-TENT-300X420X200CM) can recover the item for resell (RM868.90 cost basis).
  • (c.iv) Carry-over for 13/5: (1) re-engage TT live chat with screenshot of order detail (no Appeal button visible) — ask whoever picks up to reference Syahidah's note + the order ID; ask for appeal-path walk-through OR file appeal from their side. (2) WhatsApp Yorry Sdn Bhd warehouse to search for the return parcel that TT marked delivered 10 May (no internal log yet) — locate, photograph, assess for resell. (3) Once both done, decide: flip C1371 Withdrawn (if appeal succeeds OR resell completes) vs Rejected (if both come up empty).
  • (c.v) Chat v2 with TT support — KEY WINS captured. Re-engaged TT chat after Syahidah timeout. Described order detail UI in text (no Appeal button visible). Bot/agent replied with concrete data: (1) Appeal definitively NOT available for this reverse order (final confirmation, contradicts Syahidah's earlier "have you tried Manage Order page" probe). (2) Return tracking obtained: J&T Express, tracking 684200359040727 — this is the parcel buyer shipped back on 5/7 that TT says was delivered to Yorry 5/10. (3) Buyer-misrepresentation complaint submitted to TT internal team per agent ("I will help you submit a related inquiry regarding this issue to our internal team for further review"). Ticket created but ticket-ID-display button (view updated ticket) renders no number on our side — agent says future chat re-engagement will show updates. Webapp C1371 PATCHed with tracking_id=684200359040727 + remark on the chat outcome (both HTTP 200). Transcript v2 captured.
  • (c.vi) Updated carry-over 13/5 (post chat v2): (1) Trace J&T 684200359040727 via jtexpress.my or J&T API to confirm exact delivery date + signing receiver at Yorry Sdn Bhd. (2) WhatsApp Yorry Sdn Bhd warehouse with the tracking number + product description (Inflatable Tent 300x420x200CM, CampCottage brand) to physically locate the parcel + photograph for resell decision. (3) Re-open TT chat in 24-48h to check the buyer-misrepresentation complaint progress + grab the ticket ID. (4) Once parcel found and inspected: flip C1371 Withdrawn (resell value preserved) or Rejected (loss accepted — cash refund irrecoverable per TT, no appeal route).

🎯 P1 warehouse cross-ref MASSIVE FINDING 12/5 — 115/144 P1 clawback cases are RESELL (phantom losses):

  • Bulk flip executed: 90 cases Pending→Withdrawn (89 batch + 1 C15860 earlier). 25 deleted from DB (404 on PATCH). Per feedback_withdrawn_clawback_is_resell_refund.md: wallet clawback is cost-side of resell-refund recovery, NOT a loss. Goods recovered via warehouse resale.
  • By shop: MurahYa 27 flipped, KarlMobel 30 flipped, Hiranai 53 flipped, Luxbin 5 flipped (after deletion adjustments: actual 90 flipped Withdrawn).
  • Impact: ~RM18,400 of "clawback losses" reclassified as resell-refund recovery (NOT actual losses). Chase queue shrank from 152 to ~37 truly actionable cases.
  • 29 NOT FOUND warnings PATCHed (24 ok + 5 deleted): warehouse needs to open parcels before deciding Resell vs Damaged. Includes the 3 URGENT PRE-CLAWBACK cases (C15988 Adelmar / C15866 Gazebo) + the chase-queued C13217 + C13284 + C13227 + C15992 P1-reversed + others.
  • Skill rule reinforced (Step 9 WFR handling): warehouse cross-check via /api/returns is MANDATORY before treating any case as "clawback chase". Pre-12/5 csrrcredited runs missed this for the chase list. Now baked into the deep-check.
