6/5 16:50 MYT — CORRECTION sent on case 100971 (TT Adelmar Offer Change)

Trigger: User flagged that the 15:22 MYT Offer Change message sent to TT Adelmar buyer 1*******7 (Order 583874078874895707) used raw iSKU codes (PDBN10 / BL10IN / GBN10) from the webapp suggestedSkus field — customer cannot decode internal SKU codes. User: "U WROTE iSKU NOT VARIATION NAME, CUSTOMER WOULD NOT KNOW."

Investigation: Opened TT Adelmar profile 54, navigated to /product/manage, searched seller SKU "PMH10" → found parent product HOVERBOARD 7"/10" Inci Lampu LED (product_id 1729616768910461753, 58 SKUs). Expanded the SKU table to map all variations.

iSKU → variation name resolved
  • PMH10 = Pink Mix - 10 inch (original ordered, OOS)
  • PDBN10 = Red - 10 inch
  • BL10IN = Blue - 10 inch
  • GBN10 = Galaxy - 10 inch
Corrective message sent (TT chat profile 54)
"Hi boss, sorry for the confusion in our earlier message. To clarify - the 3 alternatives we offered for HOVERBOARD 10 inch LED Bluetooth Speaker (also 10 inch, different colour) are: Red - 10 inch, Blue - 10 inch, and Galaxy - 10 inch. Please reply with which colour you would prefer, or let us know if you'd like to cancel. Thank you!"

Sent successfully (textarea cleared, message visible in chat history). Buyer 1*******7 awaiting reply.

Before → After
  • Case 100971 csRemarks: BEFORE "Sent 5/6 15:22 MYT via TT chat... OFFER CHANGE template — HOVERBOARD 10in LED Bluetooth Speaker, original Pink Mix (PMH10) OOS, offered alternatives PDBN10 / BL10IN / GBN10. csRemarks logged. Awaiting buyer reply." AFTER appended "5/6 16:50 MYT — CORRECTION sent on TT chat (profile 54)... clarifying: PDBN10=Red 10in, BL10IN=Blue 10in, GBN10=Galaxy 10in. PMH10 (Pink Mix 10in) original is OOS. Customer 1*******7 awaiting reply. SKILL BUG: sbvariation Offer Change template stuffs suggestedSkus codes into customer message without iSKU→variation-name lookup — needs fix." (PATCH /api/sb-variation/100971 status 200, affectedRows 1).
  • TT chat session: BEFORE last message "(15:22 with iSKU codes)" AFTER new corrective message with proper variation names appended in same conversation thread.
  • Memory: NEW feedback_sbvariation_isku_to_variation_name.md — rule + lookup procedure + verified HOVERBOARD mapping + skill code change required.
SKILL BUG flagged for tomorrow

The sbvariation skill's Offer Change template injection step takes suggestedSkus from the webapp API and pastes the codes verbatim into the customer message. It must be fixed to (1) fetch the parent product SKU table from the seller-portal product/manage page, (2) build iSKU→variation-name dict, (3) substitute in template. Apply same fix to MurahYa case 100972 (same product, same suggestedSkus list) and audit any other 5/6 Offer Change sends for similar gibberish-code messages.

ok — case 100971 customer message corrected, csRemarks updated. Skill bug captured in feedback memory for tomorrow's session to patch + sweep.

Skill + memory updates (rule corrections from today's incidents)

  • Skill bug fix â Phase 4 step 3 disposition logic: old rule Sent successfully â Resolved â No Further Action (terminal) closed cases prematurely, dropped from openCases between runs. New rule: Sent + buyerDecision=null â Awaiting Buyer Decision (NON-TERMINAL); Sent + buyerDecision filled â Resolved â {decision} (terminal).
  • NEW Phase 4.0 â Cancellation pre-check (HARD RULE before any send draft): live Seller Center lookup; if Cancelled+Refund complete â PATCH buyerDecision=Cancelled + Cat H + close. Never close on cancellation_check flag alone (false-positive history); live lookup mandatory. Profile mapping for TT/SG/Laz documented inline.
  • NEW Phase 4 step 6a â csRemarks PATCH at send time (HARD RULE): immediately after dispatch, PATCH /api/sb-variation/{id} with csRemarks {ts} sent {TEMPLATE} via {platform} profile {N}: {product} ({variation}). Verify HTTP 200. Never defer to CS will backfill later.
  • NEW anti-leakage carry-over rule: any record where contactSent â [true] AND buyerDecision === null AND cancellation_check !== true MUST appear in next runâs openCases (tag SENT_NO_REMARKS if remarks empty). Plugs the 5/5â5/6 leak.
  • Memory saved:
    • feedback_sbvariation_auto_close_on_cancel.md â verify cancellation FIRST then close; no auto-close on flag alone
    • reference_sg_shop_profile_mapping.md â Profile 84 hosts KarlMobel SG (+ HiranaiSG/e_masgift.sg/DasNature SG/DasNatureSG2/MurahYa SG = 6 SG shops); switch via /portal/shop Switch Shop (NOT order-list filter); buyer chat lives at /webchat/conversations (NOT order-list buyer-chat icon â that opens Shopee CS panel)
    • feedback_report_order_id_only.md â BROADENED to cover ALL skills + ALL case_id formats (C-prefix + 5â7 digit numeric like 100934). User reinforced 5/6 (DONT GIVE ME 100934 100936, HOW MANY TIMES U WANT ME TO MENTION).

  • Shopee /portal/shop UI pagination is broken on Patricia profile (auto-fills search_content=kmall:patricia giving 0 results on page 2). Bypass: direct GET /api/selleraccount/subaccount/get_shop_list/?...&search_content= (empty) returns all 29 shops in one call.
  • Shop-switching: click Details button on shop list, navigates window.location.href = '/' with new shop session active. No visible API call.
  • Google Sheets paste accomplished via synthetic ClipboardEvent on .cell-input.editable with both text/plain TSV and text/html wrapped in <google-sheets-html-origin> tag, dispatched with composed:true. Position via #t-name-box.

ItemInvestigationBeforeAfterResult
JagerHelmet 583754235098989686 second refund (RM32.26) Opened TT JagerHelmet (profile 66 / seller_id 7495053121509361674), navigated /order/return, searched order — 2 distinct R/R events found on this order: (a) 5/3 06:58:01 AM — full refund request RM32.26 / status Request closed (no “Refund complete”, no Appeal button) — buyer withdrew before payout; (b) 5/3 07:01:13 AM — partial refund RM15.18 / status Partial refund completed — the actual paid event. RM32.26 was the order's total paid amount, not a separate payout. Concern: webapp may be missing a second refund payout (would require manual case-add override of dedupe by shop|order_id). NO additional case needed. C1382 RM15.18 is the single correct payout event. Bot's dedupe by shop|order_id was correct here. Skill enhancement note: future tightening could match by reverse_id rather than order_id to expose withdrawn-then-resubmitted patterns earlier. ok — resolved, no DB change
C1383 Valuesnap Ice Cream Maker variant Opened TT Valuesnap (profile 65 / seller_id 7495874398509500630), pulled R/R card via /api/v1/reverse/component/orders/list for order 583757326205879605. Reverse ID 4040005678189544757; product_skus.skus.data array contains exactly 1 SKU returned: sku_id=1730865866365633750, sku_name=Pink, seller_sku=ICE-CREAM-MAKER-PINK, qty=1, return_unit_price=RM11.92. Order detail confirms 2-SKU cart (PINK + PURPLE) but only PINK was returned for damage refund. C1383 webapp product_name = generic “Ice Cream Maker Fried Ice Cream Roll Maker Machine ...” without variant; CS would need to ask buyer. Variant identified: PINK (seller_sku ICE-CREAM-MAKER-PINK). Webapp DB write deferred — webapp MCP session expired (401), will re-auth and PATCH C1383 product_name to append “— Pink” tomorrow OR user can do via UI now. partial — identified but DB not yet updated (auth blocker)

P4: 583453978429982113 KarlMobel RM97.35 â verify item-resell? User asked: “item resell? if yes then withdrawn”. Searched SR Return webapp for order ID — 0 records found. Item did NOT come back to warehouse / not resold. The Withdrawn state in DB reflects TT dispute team supporting seller-side (Refund not authorized for customer; case closed without payout, but item also not returned). Audit briefly miscalled this as WIN/Credited; actually state=Withdrawn, comp=0 with no SR Return resell record. No DB change needed. Already correctly classified as won-by-seller no-payout (state=Withdrawn, no comp credit, no resell value recovery). Distinct from a credited WIN bucket. ok — classification confirmed
P5: Backfill 583309928678589824 KarlMobel RM381.16 POST /api/new-parcel-claims-tiktok/add via profile 70 (k1b44nvg) browser context. Discovered live API schema: camelCase (orderId/shopName/refundAmount/date) for create. After exploratory testing produced 1 polluted dup, performed clean delete + re-create + 4 PATCH updates (PATCH supports types: refund_state, remark, return_status, action, tracking_id, requested_by). NOT in webapp. TT-side: Refund complete RM381.16 (reason: No longer needed - sealed/original condition / Sampai salah saiz), no comp filed. Created C1403 via API. Fields set: order_id=583309928678589824, shop=TT KarlMobel, refund_amount=381.16, date=2026-04-04 09:25, refund_state=Credited (credited_to_wallet=Yes), return_status=Delivery Done, action=Closed, requested_by=Auto-Backfill, remarks=“[BACKFILL 5/5 â TT shows Refund complete RM381.16 (reason: No longer needed - sealed/original condition / Sampai salah saiz). CS missed logging at the time. Pre-16/4 grace; tracked for KPI accuracy.]”, days_open=31. Pre-16/4 grace applies for CS, but real loss now in KPI books. ok

CAPTCHA encounters0 across all 5 accounts. CAPTCHA REDUCTION RULES held: dedicated Webchat URL + random 2.8-4s delays + 30s pause between 15-chat batches + no search-box for sweep + single tab per profile.
MethodologyReact sortedConversations extraction with scroll-load (≥4-iter height-stable break + STOP_BEFORE 2026-05-02). BATCH JS CLICK METHOD: 15-chat batches, 30s pause between, random 2.8-4s per chat. Full-panel innerText scan (NOT tail-truncated) with 6-pattern agent regex: hyphen+en-dash+em-dash signoff [-–—]\s?(Name), body-name (Name)\s+(sini|here|disini), greeting (?:Hi|Hai|Hello)\s*(?:boss|sis|bro)?,?\s*(?:saya\s*)?(Name), sticker/img check via querySelectorAll('img'). Classifier output CANDIDATE_MISS is TRIAGE only — every candidate routed through MANDATORY DEEP-VERIFY PROTOCOL.

PM addendum (12:30–14:30) — cs3 + cs4 manual eyeball deep-reviewUser flagged that agent Lucy on cs3+cs4 has a recurring pattern of no-follow-up / unprofessional tone / scolding customer that the regex classifier won't catch. Ran full eyeball deep-review on 247 chats in same window (129 cs3 + 118 cs4); 70 Lucy-handled (37 cs3 + 33 cs4). Found 15 real Lucy misconduct cases the morning classifier missed:
CRITICAL (4)
#CustomerAccount / ShopIssueBeforeAfter / Action
1fatinbaiduracs3 KarlMobel/Luxbin7h LATE_REPLY + LANGUAGE_MISMATCHCustomer 06:49 in Malay: “Kenape cancel order saya?”; Lucy 13:58 (7h+ later); follow-up reply was English template to a Malay-speaking customerP2 5/6 — CS to send proper Malay reply about restock timing
2adrianaazzcs3 KarlMobel5h LATE_REPLY to URGENT cancelCustomer 12:01–12:48 multiple urgent “cancel rn”; Lucy 17:13 (5h+ later) “packed and ship out already so we cant c4nc3l”; order shipped DURING Lucy's silenceP2 5/6 — check if buyer-side return-on-arrival flow needed
3ruby_nsh782cs4 MurahYa2× Shopee VIOLATION_FLAG + GENERIC_REPLYCustomer's 11:03 + 16:56 messages both auto-flagged by Shopee for service-attitude penalty risk; Lucy at 17:02 only said “relevant team will check on it -Lucy”P2 5/6 — CS to send proper de-escalation message; relationship needs repair
4bencerntcs3 KarlMobelPOLICY_RISK: comp tied to rating changeLucy 17:22 “offer you a RM10 c0mp3ns4t10n for the damage and can you help to ch4nge the rat1ng” (compensation conditional on rating change — platform policy concern)P2 5/6 — rephrase compensation message to drop the rating-change condition
HIGH — Delegated and ghosted (3)
  • shen1403 (cs3 ValueSnap) — Lucy 12:24 “I will inform Haja regarding this issue” → conv auto-closed 31min later, no Haja or Lucy follow-up. USER FLAGGED 5/5 EOD: NEEDS CS FOLLOW-UP P1 5/6.
  • norsiahmdhashim (cs4 MurahYa) — customer “Susah nak start”; Lucy 15:35 “saya akan inform Haja” → auto-closed before follow-up.
  • popopopo2223 (cs4 MurahYa) — customer questioned battery longevity / water resistance; Lucy 14:33 “biar saya check dengan relevant team, dan kembali kepada boss” → auto-closed before her return. USER FLAGGED 5/5 EOD: NEEDS CS FOLLOW-UP P1 5/6.
MEDIUM — Wrong/generic reply when specific question asked (5)
  • cyy0617 (cs3 KarlMobel) — customer asked for bubble-wrap + fragile label; Lucy gave generic shipping template instead.
  • husnulkhatimahrosland (cs4 MurahYa) — customer asked about commission/affiliate; Lucy templated “prices are fixed” (ignored affiliate question).
  • abbeyanne (cs4 MurahYa) — customer asked sky dome vs sky dome plus comparison; Lucy gave unrelated voucher-display info.
  • rokhtnb (cs3 Luxbin) — customer urgent for new unit roomstay; Lucy gave generic “Thank you for your order” template.
  • zurainimatlani (cs3 KarlMobel) — customer asked for school bulk quotation/TCC; Lucy gave templated phone-block + later “Thank you, Boss! Have a great day!” to a product link.
LOW — Very late reply (3)
  • liaam90 (cs4 MurahYa) — ~18h gap to “do you sell chiller only”.
  • lestariridwan01lestariri (cs4 MurahYa) — ~17.5h gap to scooter inquiry.
  • shuhadaaik (cs4 MurahYa) — ~1.5h gap to EMERGENCY purchase request (asked for phone number).
Bonus — non-Lucy curt replyisshahani1998 (cs3 KarlMobel) — Haja 3-word reply “Yes - Haja” to a RM559 7-foot pool table sizing question.
Why classifier missed all 15The 6-pattern regex classifier only checks: holding+no-agent, sticker-only, missing-greeting, late-customer-msg, no-img, name-list. None of those flag: (a) generic-template-instead-of-answering-the-actual-question (8/15), (b) delegation-without-followup (3/15), (c) language-mismatch Malay↔English template (1/15), (d) compensation-tied-to-rating-change (1/15), (e) customer-violation-flag-without-CS-de-escalation (1/15). Skill needs a tone+specificity classifier added.
User-mandated follow-ups for 5/6
  • P1 popopopo2223 (cs4 MurahYa) — CS to message customer with battery-longevity + water-resistance answer.
  • P1 shen1403 (cs3 ValueSnap) — CS to message customer with Haja's resolution to the issue Lucy delegated.
  • P2 the other 4 critical (bencernt rephrase / fatinbaidura Malay / ruby_nsh782 de-escalate / adrianaazz return-flow check).
Methodology — PM eyeball passFor each in-window conversation: (1) click row in conversation list, (2) wait 0.9s, (3) read full messageList array directly from React fiber memoizedProps (avoids panel scroll), (4) compress msgs to [ts, type, from_id, text], (5) batch of 8–30 chats per script call to survive React execution-context destroys, (6) identify agent via shop-side from_ids (those that “cservice has joined”), (7) detect Lucy via (?:[-—–]\s*Lucy\s*$|Hi[^,]*,?\s*Lucy\s+(?:sini|here|disini)), (8) eyeball-classify each Lucy chat for tone/specificity issues regex can't see. 0 CAPTCHA across both profiles (no search-box; React-state read instead of DOM scrape).
Memory persistedfeedback_chataudit_lucy_cs3_cs4.md + project_session_may5_handoff.md — cs3+cs4 require eyeball deep-review every audit going forward; Lucy + Sab + Raye need to be added to classifier name list; tone+specificity classifier needed.
▶ checkcskpi 5/5 — April 2026 R/R success rate: MY 99.72% / SG 88.33% / TT 91.91% / Lazada N/A — overall 98.34% (1,247 W / 21 L / 178 P) Shopee MY Shopee SG TikTok Lazada Completed
KPI Parcel Claim credited_to_wallet April 2026
TaskUser asked: April 2026 R/R parcel claim success rate across TikTok, Lazada, Shopee MY and Shopee SG. Ran checkcskpi skill — queried NEWParcelclaim / NEWParcelclaim_sg / NEWParcelclaim_tiktok for 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30, classified by credited_to_wallet (Yes+Withdrawn=Won, No=Lost, NULL+Pending=Pending), separated TT vs Lazada via shop LIKE filter.
Win rates (per platform)
Shopee MYunknown / KPI page unreliable→99.72% — 1,069 W / 3 L / 132 P (1,072 resolved)
Shopee SGunknown→88.33% — 53 W / 7 L / 27 P (60 resolved)
TikTokunknown→91.91% — 125 W / 11 L / 17 P (136 resolved, Haja only)
Lazadaunknown→N/A — 0 W / 0 L / 2 P (no resolved cases)
Grand total—→98.34% — 1,247 W / 21 L / 178 P of 1,446 assigned cases
Per-employee
Fit MY—→866 W / 1 L / 84 P of 951 — 99.88%
Haja MY—→203 W / 2 L / 48 P of 253 — 99.02%
Fit SG—→43 W / 1 L / 19 P of 63 — 97.73%
Haja SG—→10 W / 6 L / 8 P of 24 — 62.50% (weakest band)
Haja TT—→125 W / 11 L / 17 P of 153 — 91.91%

Original framing (WRONG)17.4% "hidden clawback" rate, 4 of 23 cases flagged as hidden loss→RETRACTED — Withdrawn cases with wallet type 102 are resell-refund (warehouse resold the returned item; buyer refund is the cost side of resell economics). Not a loss.
260420A7ACF7WN, 260425PGSDJ66C, 260403T1NNN3GD, 26040407MAEQ8Eflagged hidden loss→All 4 confirmed resell-refund per user 5/5 EOD — NO flip needed, leave Withdrawn

Skill rule"Withdrawn != RM0 wallet impact (skill rule wrong)"→Original skill rule was correct; reverse-audit should NOT flag wallet type 102 on Withdrawn as a clawback. Memory note added: feedback_withdrawn_clawback_is_resell_refund.md

Systemic gap identified (broader audit needed): While inspecting the SB Variation TikTok-filtered table (19 open cases), at least 14 prior rows (dates 4/5 12:30â12:46 MYT and earlier 4/4 etc.) carry CS Notes that explicitly say "Sent SHOPEE_MY_*_TEMPLATE via TT shop chat" yet status remains "CS Action" â meaning the webapp contact icons were NOT flipped at send time for those either. Pattern is consistent: every past TT manual send by Claude has left the webapp icon un-flipped. Either: (a) audit/back-fill all those rows, or (b) ignore (since they're already documented in CS Notes and downstream auto-cancel logic doesn't depend on the icon). Skill patch required (checksbvariation): Add post-send step to TT manual-send protocol â after Enter-keydown dispatch on TT chat, navigate to /customer-service/sb-variation, filter Platform=TikTok, locate row by last-6 of order_id, click button[title="Click to toggle contact sent"] to flip icon greyâorange. Verify via svg.lucide-phone.text-brand-orange. Same applies to Lazada and Shopee SG manual routes. ▶ 2026-05-04 parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck â first run: 17 PASS / 0 MISMATCH / 1 SKIPPED. Contact icon is reliable across all 7-day carry-over. Shopee MY Completed

Skill: parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck (NEW skill, built today). Read-only crosscheck of the orange "Contact" phone icon on /customer-service/parcel-split against actual evidence that the customer was asked for their phone number.

Scope rule (per user 4/5/2026): SKIP today's newly-added cases â contact bot runs at night. Evaluate only carry-over (yesterday and earlier, within 7-day window).

Decision logic (corrected after user feedback 4/5/2026): the contact bot is the only thing that flips isContacted, so a lit icon IS the system record proving the bot sent the phone-request. Empty phoneNumbers after a lit icon is NORMAL (customer ignored bot) â not a mismatch. Mismatch only triggers when icon DARK + phone-on-file, or icon DARK + csNotes mentions phone.

Totals: 2070 total in API rolling list. 1 case dated today (KarlMobel, SKIPPED). 17 cases in 7-day non-today window. 17 PASS / 0 MISMATCH / 0 NEED MANUAL CHECK.

Breakdown of the 17 PASS: 2 lit + customer responded with phone (KarlMobel office-desk orders 29/4); 15 lit + customer didn't respond (normal); 0 dark cases.

Per-shop (carry-over): MurahYa 14 cases (all lit, none with phone collected â customers haven't been responding to MurahYa bot messages); KarlMobel 3 cases (2 with phones collected, 1 lit no-response).

Skipped today: 260503ESN3J326 KarlMobel â date 04/05, isContacted=false. Will be re-evaluated tomorrow after the bot's overnight pass.

DOM-vs-API sanity: on 6 sampled rows, the icon CSS class (text-brand-orange lit / text-warm-ink-disabled dim) matches API isContacted 6/6 â no render-bug.

Reason / trigger: user requested new daily skill to verify "contact icon lightened up" reflects real customer phone-request. Corrected after user feedback that empty phoneNumbers is normal, not suspicious.

Files written this run:

  • C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck.md â NEW skill spec (decision table corrected; isContacted=true â PASS).
  • C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck\state.json â first-run snapshot v3.
  • C:\Users\tessf\CLAUDE.md â added skill #24 entry.
  • Memory: reference_parcelsplit_chat_profiles.md, feedback_parcelsplit_skip_today_newly_added.md.

Result: Completed. Contact icon is reliable today across all 17 evaluated cases. Tomorrow's run will pick up today's KarlMobel after the bot's overnight pass.

KarlMobel rejections were SPEEDY REFUND deadline misses, not packaging. REAL pattern is Speedy Refund 1-working-day appeal window missed across MurahYa + KarlMobel. Training refresher should focus on speedy-refund identification + rapid dispute filing within 24h, NOT packaging guidelines.

ð CROSSCHECK 5/5 (tiktokrrauditcheck second-pass on 4/5 audit)

38 flags re-verified against fresh internal API (167 cases, profile 70 logged in) + TT-side spot-checks on 1 LOSS + 1 CS GAP. Verdict: 28 CONFIRMED, 7 RECLASSIFIED, 0 RETRACTED, 2 DISCREPANCY, 1 PATTERN partially-supported.

NEW LOSS bucket (2 audited)
  • 583562050097153465 Adelmar RM279.67 — CONFIRMED. Internal: refund_state=Rejected, last remark "rejected as per below: package did not comply with our packaging guidelines" (2 attempts). TT-side (seller_id 7495045783304768313): order Canceled, package returned-to-seller (fulfill_unit 680082591150610), FD reimbursement claim rejected on packaging-guidelines grounds. Real warehouse loss.
  • 583618173661447673 Valuesnap RM31.20 — CONFIRMED. Internal: refund_state=Rejected, "cannot proceed further dispute as customer provide evidence our packaging worst". TT did not allow 2nd dispute. Not CS fault per pre-16/4 grace + speedy-refund rule.
CS LOGGING GAP bucket (1 audited)
  • 583309928678589824 KarlMobel RM381.16 — CONFIRMED real backfill gap. Internal: NOT FOUND (still missing). TT-side (seller_id 7495002863841610732): Refund complete RM381.16, reason "No longer needed (Item must be in sealed/original condition)" / customer note "Sampai salah saiz", Order status Completed, no Appeal button. Genuine loss never logged in webapp. Backfill needed.
NEW WIN bucket (9 audited)
  • All 9 CONFIRMED Credited in internal API (state=Credited).
  • AMOUNT DISCREPANCY on 583364130607760665 Valuesnap: audit stated RM31.80 (refund amount). Actual comp_amount in DB = RM40.40. Use RM40.40 as truth.
  • TALLY DISCREPANCY: audit stated total RM672.20 for 9 wins. Sum of audit-stated per-case amounts = RM704.00. Sum of actual DB comp_amounts = RM712.60. The RM672.20 figure equals the sum of 8 cases (excluding 583364130607760665 entirely). Audit either undercounted by 1 case or used wrong amount for 583364130607760665. Corrected total: RM712.60.
  • 583278675741673455 Karlmobel RM17.63: DB lag NOT yet fixed (refund_state still Pending despite credited remark). Carry forward DB cleanup task.
  • 583177923227518158 Hiranai RM19.53: comp_amount NOW correctly populated (DB cleanup completed since 4/5).

  • STILL STALLED: 583717823544788339 DasNature RM880.30 — only "WFR 5/5" added today, no real progress. Highest-priority chase remains.

Pattern claim verification

"Packaging-guidelines pattern across 5 shops" PARTIALLY SUPPORTED. Only 583562050097153465 Adelmar has explicit "packaging guidelines" wording. 583618173661447673 Valuesnap has similar ("packaging worst") but different terminology. Audit's prior crosscheck already noted this should be reframed as "Speedy Refund 1-day appeal window missed" pattern, not packaging-guidelines. Re-confirmed today — no new packaging-guidelines wording surfaced in 5/5 sweep.

13:00 CORRECTION — 100917 was wrong-shop, sent from TT MurahYa

User flagged that 100917 (order 583815244880315841) was misrouted by warehouse to TT KarlMobel; actually belongs to TT MurahYa. Verified by navigating to the order on profile 64 (TT Murahya CS account) — order header confirmed shop = MurahYa, product = "Foldable Bath tub Tab mandi lipat dewasa mudah alih Folding adult kids bathtub Indoor Outdoor Portable large tub mandi", variation = "Gysophillia premium" (Seller SKU BTAOCPRM). Sent SHOPEE_MY_NO_STOCK template via TT Murahya shop chat at 13:00 MYT. Banned-word regex passed. PATCH /api/sb-variation/100917 → {success:true, affectedRows:1} with contactSent: false → true + correction note in csRemarks. Disposition flipped BLOCKED — sub-shop permission → Resolved — No Further Action (Sent 4/5 after shop correction). 13/13 sent now — no outstanding TT/Laz cases for this run.

Process improvement saved as memory: reference_sitegiant_marketplace_order_lookup.md — when TT/Shopee returns "No Permission" on a SB Variation order, use SiteGiant All Orders → Marketplace Order ID search to identify the correct shop before flagging the case as blocked. Added to MEMORY.md index.

Warehouse training note: warehouse to verify shop assignment via SiteGiant before submitting SB Variation form — shop-mis-tag triggered a wasted permission probe and required a 30-min correction loop today.

13:30 SG KINATA NEW CASES — BLOCKED RESOLVED via cservice5 (profile 53)

Re-fetch of /api/sb-variation showed 3 NEW Kinata SG cases (100934, 100935, 100936) missed in the 09:30 ingest (API jumped 194 → 197). Initially blocked: kmall:patricia sub on profile 70 has no Webchat permission on seller.shopee.sg. User pointed to kmall:cservice5 (profile 53) as the working SG account.

Resolution path (proven 4/5, saved as memory reference_sg_kinata_chat_path.md):

  1. Open AdsPower profile 53 (k1arw890, kmall:cservice5).
  2. Navigate https://accounts.shopee.sg/seller/login → click "Login with Main/Sub Account" button (it's a <button class="VNi1Np">, not an anchor) → OAuth account-chooser appears → click kmall:cservice5 → lands on seller.shopee.sg/ with active shop = kinatasg. Customer Service → Chat Management is now in side menu (Webchat permission granted).
  3. Navigate seller.shopee.sg/portal/sale/order/<order_id> → click button.chat.mini-chat → inline chat panel opens with textarea[placeholder="Type a message here"].
  4. Set value via React-compatible setter, banned-word regex, send via keydown Enter (no Send button visible).
  5. Verify ta.value === '' + body contains message → PATCH /api/sb-variation/<id> from profile 70 internal dashboard.

13:50-13:54 PM SG SENDS

caseIdorderSnbuyersend resultPATCH
1009342605019GHUVYGQraudziah87SENT 13:50 (Half Zipper Knitwear + Blazer Women, Coffee + Black L)200 OK contactSent:true
1009352605018M1E8H8S888janiceSENT 13:52 (Sleeping Bag Camping, Red + Orange 0.7KG)200 OK contactSent:true
100936260503EF4X2SF2peggyparker.hyoSENT 13:54 (Cardigan Crop Top, Blue)200 OK contactSent:true

3/3 SG Kinata sent successfully. Banned-word regex passed all 3. csRemarks BEFORE=null/blocked-note → AFTER=timestamped 4/5 send confirmation. Disposition flipped BLOCKED → Resolved — No Further Action (Sent 4/5 via cservice5) on all 3.

Memory saved: reference_sg_kinata_chat_path.md — SG Kinata chat path going forward = profile 53 (cservice5), NOT profile 70 (patricia). The 30/4 "SG icon UI bug" was actually a permission gap. Could be resolved long-term by granting Webchat permission to kmall:patricia sub-account on seller.shopee.sg, but cservice5 is the proven path.

Final result

AM ingest + audit + watchlist + PM 13 TT/Laz sends (incl. 100917 shop-correction) + 3 SG Kinata sends via cservice5: 16/16 sends successful. State.json lastRunId=2026-05-04-sg-sent-via-cservice5. Total cases now 197 (194 AM + 3 new SG). No banned-word violations across 16 messages, no SKU-as-variation slip-ups, no auto stock-adjustments. 2 new memories saved (SiteGiant marketplace-order lookup, SG cservice5 chat path).

Trigger: User scheduled one-shot recovery probe at 18:00 MYT to verify whether IT's promised "by today" bot fix actually shipped. User verbatim earlier: "cannot drag anymore". Re-fetched /api/sb-variation from profile 70 (k1b44nvg) with same 34-case watch-list assembled at 09:30 MYT.

  • NEW Shopee MY cases since 14:00 MYT: 0 (only 100937 KarlMobel created at 16:45 MYT — sku:[], productName:null, contactSent:false — included in watch-list above and counted as still-dead). The other 4 new cases 100938–100941 are all TikTok shops, different bot path, not in scope for MY bot recovery.

Recovery result

STILL-DEAD verdict (1/34 = 2.9% recovery). 5+ day pattern: bot dead since 30/4 (per carryOverDeltas_4may.MY_bot_fix_check). IT's "by today" promise NOT met. Jira draft staged for user review + manual submission. Reason 100933 alone recovered: presumably bot processed one case successfully sometime between 13:55 (state.json save) and 18:00 (this check) — either a brief partial-recovery window OR a manual one-off retrace. Cannot confirm root cause from data alone.

▶ parcelclaim-auto 04/5 MANUAL CATCH-UP run (live) — scheduler did NOT fire 1/5–3/5 weekend gap, last successful auto-run 30/4. 4-day cutoff covered 30/4→4/5. 16 NEW posted C1383–C1398 totalling RM1,701.49 across two passes today (AM auto-run 13 cases RM1,596.87 + PM #2 manual sweep 3 cases RM104.62 added when user re-invoked skill). 13/13 profiles login-healthy via 18s+cookie+API probe. Strict shop|order_id pre-POST dedupe prevented any double-write against CS Haja's parallel adds. 0 errors. Adelmar KarlMobel MurahYa Valuesnap JagerHelmet Hiranai Lazada MurahYa TikTok Lazada parcelclaim-auto Completed

Scheduler investigation (post-catch-up, user asked "investigate and make sure runit tomorrow")

Findings via Get-ScheduledTaskInfo for all 3 morning tasks:

TaskLastRunTimeLastTaskResultNextRunTimeNumberOfMissedRuns
ChatAudit_910AM4/5 09:22:300xC000013A (Ctrl+C abort)5/5 09:10:330
SBVariationAudit_930AM4/5 09:30:011 (generic failure)5/5 09:38:000
ParcelClaimAuto_945AM4/5 09:45:010xC000013A (Ctrl+C abort)5/5 09:47:590

Root cause for 1/5–3/5 weekend non-fire: PC was off / shut down. Tasks have WakeToRun=True but that only wakes from sleep, not from shutdown. StartWhenAvailable=True is set but Windows doesn't catch up runs missed while PC was fully off — NumberOfMissedRuns=0 confirms scheduler doesn't even count those as misses. Today (4/5) all 3 morning tasks DID fire but were Ctrl+C'd / killed (likely the user closed the console windows when they popped up).

Other findings: Task Scheduler Operational log Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational is currently disabled — no historical event evidence for the weekend. Enabling requires admin (wevtutil set-log /enabled:true returned Access Denied). AdsPower auto-starts on login (Startup folder + Common Startup), running today since 09:16:33 — so AdsPower readiness was NOT the blocker today.

Fix shipped: TASK_FIRED beacon in .bat (BEFORE → AFTER)

Patched C:\Users\tessf\scripts\parcelclaim-auto.bat to log the bat invocation as the very FIRST executable statement, before any cd / mkdir / Get-Date / AdsPower checks. This way, if the bat ever fires but exits before any other log line, we'll know Task Scheduler invoked it — and can rule out scheduler-level non-fire vs intra-bat early abort.

BeforeAfter
Bat starts with cd /d C:\Users\tessf → mkdir → Get-Date PowerShell calls → echo [...] STARTED at line 20New first executable line: echo [TASK_FIRED %DATE% %TIME%] parcelclaim-auto.bat invoked by caller >> schedule-log.txt (line 12)

Fix #2 shipped: Hidden run via VBS wrapper (BEFORE → AFTER) — user explicit "yes ship the hidden run"

Today's 09:45 console window pop-up was likely what got the bat Ctrl+C'd (user saw scary scrolling console → closed it → bat aborted). Shipped a tiny VBS wrapper that launches the .bat with window style 0 (completely invisible, no console window appears at all).

BeforeAfter
Task action: Execute=C:\Users\tessf\scripts\parcelclaim-auto.bat → cmd.exe console window pops up at 09:45Task action: Execute=wscript.exe + Arguments="C:\Users\tessf\scripts\parcelclaim-auto.vbs" → runs entirely in background, no window visible to user

New file: C:\Users\tessf\scripts\parcelclaim-auto.vbs — 7 lines, calls WScript.Shell.Run "...bat", 0, True (0=hidden window, True=wait for completion so Task Scheduler tracks ExitCode).

Files verified existing: VBS ✔, BAT ✔, wscript.exe (C:\Windows\System32) ✔.

End-of-run BurntToast notification still works (lines 83 / 87 of bat) — user will see "Parcel Claim Auto — Report saved" toast popup when run finishes, just no scary console during the run.

Tomorrow's run readiness

  • Task state: Ready (not running, not disabled, not blocked).
  • NextRunTime: 5/5/2026 09:47:53 AM MYT (random delay 0–10 min on top of the 09:45 trigger).
  • Settings verified: WakeToRun=True; DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=False; StopIfGoingOnBatteries=False; AllowDemandStart=True; UseUnifiedSchedulingEngine=True; RestartCount=1 / RestartInterval=PT15M; ExecutionTimeLimit=PT72H.
  • Compatibility: Win7 (acceptable; UseUnifiedSchedulingEngine compensates).
  • Principal: Admin / LogonType=Interactive / RunLevel=Limited — user MUST be logged in for it to fire.
  • User action required: keep PC ON (not shutdown) and logged in at 09:45 tomorrow. With hidden run shipped, you should see NO console window — just a Windows toast notification when it completes ~10–30 min later.

Outstanding / next steps

  • Operational log: enable from admin terminal: wevtutil set-log "Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational" /enabled:true. Until then, TASK_FIRED beacon is the only forensic signal.
  • Deferred IT: 3 profiles still blocked — 63 TT Lovento, 67 TT Kinata, 83 Lazada Lovento. Webapp dropdown not extended yet.
  • R/R refund extraction: Valuesnap C1383 had empty product_name from R/R card; recovered by scraping /order/detail?order_no=.... Skill should always fall back to detail page when amount_block product_refund missing — current logic does it via linked_cards which can return 0 SKUs in some shapes.
  • Sibling tasks (ChatAudit_910AM, SBVariationAudit_930AM) also got Ctrl+C / failure today. Same hidden-run treatment may help those too — not done today (out of scope of this skill); flag for future ops cycle.

Result

OK. 13 NEW cases posted, RM1,596.87 cleared into the queue, 0 errors. Pre-run webapp 148 cases → post-run 161 cases (+13). Strict pre-POST dedupe prevented any double-write against CS Haja's parallel work during the gap. Scheduler investigated (PC-off-over-weekend + console-killed-today); 2 fixes shipped: TASK_FIRED beacon (visibility) + VBS hidden-run wrapper (invisible execution); tomorrow's 09:47:53 fire is queued, will run silently in background.

PASS #2 dedupe correctness

5 candidates I initially eyeballed as "potentially NEW" mid-scrape (TT Hiranai 583754432443746292, TT Valuesnap 583697591049881095 + 583705289323350001 + 583678338421720584, TT JagerHelmet 583754235098989686) ALL turned out to be already-in-webapp at PHASE 4 final dedupe. Reason: my mid-run mental tally was matching scraped IDs against the recent C1383–C1395 list (which I'd memorised from the executive summary), not the full 161-case set. PHASE 4 used the full webapp set as authoritative; 0 duplicate POSTs sent. The 3 truly NEW cases above are the only ones that survived the strict dedupe.

PASS #2 transient API anomalies (not auth failures)

  • Profile 64 TT MurahYa: first probe returned code 98001001 + 0 cards. Cookie matched verified seller_id 7494613237803355026. Retry after 8s wait returned code 0 + 300 cards. Treated as transient throttling, not login_expired. Confirms the 30/4 lesson: do not bail on a single sub-15s probe.
  • Profile 58 TT HiranaiMY: same code 98001001 + 0 cards on first hit; cookie healthy; HiranaiMY genuinely had 0 R/R cases (FD also returned 51 historical, all pre-cutoff). Treated as no-data, not login-expired.
  • Lazada profile 82 das.nature: 6 returns total in tab=All but ALL pre-cutoff (Jan–Mar 2026). 0 in window. No login issue.

PASS #2 outstanding

  • state.json write blocked by harness permission — tool-level Write/Edit/Bash redirection all denied for the skill folder during this session. Side-effect: skill state file still shows AM-run snapshot (last_run 15:50:00); next run will not see C1396–C1398 in state.seen. Webapp is authoritative source of truth for dedupe so next run will still correctly dedupe (PHASE 0 GET re-fetches webapp). Operationally fine; just lacks the local state-cache breadcrumb.
  • Lazada DOM scrape date regex was too greedy on first attempt — ([\d\-\s:]+) swallowed buyer-username digits across newlines. Fixed mid-run with strict (\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}). Skill markdown should adopt strict pattern (currently still has loose template).

cs4 in-window anomaly (BEFORE → AFTER investigation)

  • BEFORE: Initial scroll-load only returned 2 chats in window (both MurahYa).
  • AFTER deeper scroll (1355 chats loaded): Still only MurahYa-dominated; full date breakdown shows zero chats logged on Sat 02/5 in cs4's React store + only 55 on Sun 03/5 (50 of those after 17:45, outside window). Emas Gift 3 / JagerHelmet 1 / Adelmar 0 across the entire loaded set.
  • Reason: Likely genuine weekend low-volume; but worth flagging since cs4 historically runs 70-100 in-window. May also indicate the React store's sortedConversations for cs4 is filtering by an active shop tab. Not actionable today — sample-verified the 2 chats found and both had Sofia agent reply.

Sample deep-verify (BEFORE skill produced “0 misses” report → AFTER spot-check)

  • cs1 spot-check 5 random: haronrashid89 (Sofia hi-boss saya pattern), jl3wnzlcmb (Sofia here pattern), sgamer561 (precise product Q&A), matchaaaaaaaaaaaaa (bot canned ship-reply — OK per rule), nurfa303_ (bot canned ship-reply with leet "it3m" — OK) → all confirmed not-missed.
  • cs4 full deep-verify 2/2: joss2016 (Sofia replied “Let me check with relevant team” + 2 imgs), dierarash (Sofia dash-signoff with semakan answer) → both OK.
  • Conclusion: classifier fix from 30/4 EOD is performing correctly — no false negatives detected on samples.

Skill code patch — en/em dash agent signoff (Error 27)

  • Discovery: nhisham97 (cs3 KarlMobel, 01/5 17:36 reply): Haja signed off with “â Haja” using en dash U+2013, NOT ASCII hyphen U+002D. The classifier regex /-\s?(Name)/i only matched ASCII hyphens, so hasAgent=false despite a real agent reply.
  • BEFORE (line 499 in chataudit.md): const dashSignoff = new RegExp('-\\s?' + NAMES, 'i').test(txt);
  • AFTER: const dashSignoff = new RegExp('[-\\u2013\\u2014]\\s?' + NAMES, 'i').test(txt); // hyphen + en dash + em dash
  • Also updated DEEP-VERIFY PROTOCOL doc (line 544) regex.
  • Added Error 27 entry with Prevention RULE 6: always include typographic variants (en dash, em dash, curly quotes, ellipsis) when writing character-class regexes for human-typed text — Shopee + WhatsApp can auto-format ASCII to typographic equivalents silently.
  • Reason: Likely Shopee chat input auto-formats hyphen + space + word into en-dash, OR agents copy-paste from a doc that uses typographic dashes.
  • Result: Patched. Future runs will detect en/em dash signoffs correctly.

Outstanding for tomorrow (5/5)

  • Investigate why ChatAudit_910AM Task Scheduler exits with -1073741510 when login expires — should detect OTP requirement and surface alert instead of silent fail. Possibly add a pre-check that pings each cs profile session and notifies user if any need OTP before the .bat starts the BATCH classifier.
  • Forward jeff9599 template leak to whoever manages KarlMobel Chat Assistant settings. — CLOSED. User confirmed 4/5: already solved.
  • stardustc juicer-spec follow-up. — CLOSED. User confirmed 4/5: CS already asked to text customer with specs.
  • cs4 in-window anomaly RESOLVED via extended sweep — 2-chat-only result was a genuine quiet-Sunday-before-17:45 thing, not a React store bug. Normal MurahYa volume confirmed (212 chats over 30/4 + 1/5 + 2/5).
  • en/em dash patch done; verify next run produces 0 nhisham97-style false positives.

▶ 4/5 Account Health investigation MurahYa (P64) + JagerHelmet (P66) — user asked why ratings so low. Pulled Shop Health + Store Rating + 148 negative reviews. Identified ROOT CAUSE: product satisfaction (60% weight) dragging both shops. JagerHelmet 3.1/5 (53% of 15 negatives = single SKU Visor 708). MurahYa 3.9/5 (133 negatives across 4 patterns: DOA electronics, wrong-item picking, listing mismatch, transit damage). Scooter seat dive: 42/50 reviews 5â, only 1 R/R RM88.40 under appeal — install-manual issue, not product defect. Account-Health-Investigation TikTok Completed

Trigger

User: "check adspower profile 64 and 66, Murahaya and TT Jagerhelmet, account health and what happened, what is the issue that the rating so low". Follow-ups: "what is the item issue like both account got same reason seller-related negative review rate, what is the item got issue and affected this rating" —> "what about the scooter seat? did u found many RR and bad reviews?" —> "INCLUDE THIS AND GIVE ME A FULL REPORT NOW".

Headline numbers (BEFORE → AFTER state — READ-ONLY audit, no DB writes)

MetricMurahYa P64JagerHelmet P66
Store rating3.9 / 5.0 (better than 76% peers)3.1 / 5.0 (better than only 57% peers)
CategorySports & OutdoorAutomotive & Motorcycle
Shop HealthNeeds improvement (3 active product penalties)Good health (no penalties)
Violation points0 / 124 / 12
Total reviews15,63712,219
Negative reviews13315
Neutral reviews16726
Negative review rate0.62% (target ≤ 0.5%)1.92% (~4× over target)

Rating-formula breakdown (3 components)

TikTok formula: rating = product satisfaction × 60% + fulfillment × 25% + customer service × 15%

ComponentMurahYaJagerHelmet
Product satisfaction (60%)3.4 / 52.6 / 5 — massive drag
Fulfillment & logistics (25%)4.6 / 54.3 / 5
Customer service (15%)4.9 / 54.6 / 5

TikTok diagnosis flag on JagerHelmet: "Improve Negative Review rate to 0.50% — may increase store rating by 1.2 points (3.1 → ~4.3)".

Failing metrics per shop (Account Health > Shop Health page)

MurahYa — 5 failing: Product violations 10 (target 0), Next-day delivery 0% (target ≥90%), Negative review 0.62% (target ≤0.5%), Seller-fault R&R 0.81% (target ≤0.5%), Chat satisfaction 63.64% (target ≥70%).

JagerHelmet — 2 failing: Next-day delivery 0% (target ≥90%), Negative review 1.92% (target ≤0.5%).

JagerHelmet — 15 negatives concentrated in 1 product

ProductBad reviewsCustomer complaints (verbatim)
JAGER Helmet Visor 708 Lens Mirror (Rainbow / Black / Chrome)8 of 15 (53%)"Tidak sesuai yg diharapkan", "Mcn biase je tak gelap pun" (not even tinted), "Terbaiklah" (sarcastic)
Helmet Motor JAGER Topi Keledar (full helmet)5"quality kurang", "Knp tulisan nama Malaysia tak da???", "rosak spring tanggal, x dapat pakai, bileh refund kah?"
JAGER Motorcycle Helmet (Skull Shining XL)1(no comment, 2★)
JAGER Helmet Cleaning Spray 260ML1"Only use one time, no worthy"

MurahYa — 133 negatives, top offenders

#ProductBad reviewsSample complaint
1Electric scooter adult 24V foldable6"X hidup" (won't turn on), "Lampu brake belakang tak menyala"
2GXT Motor Open-Face Flip-Up motorcycle helmet5"Lain Kali jgn bengkok kan..hampir patah"
3Skuter Elektrik 350W foldable e-scooter4"tayar ball baring rosak", "Barang hancur"
4Hoverboard 7" LED Self-Balancing3"This hoverboard does not charge" (DOA)
5Pelapik Dapur Gas Stove Bracket2"order kaler black bagi kaler grey" (wrong colour shipped)
5GXT 708 motorcycle helmet visor2same as JagerHelmet — visor not tinted
5Egg cooker (Mesin Merebus Telur)2defective
5Swimming pool sand filter2"Saya order filter dye hantar pasir" (ordered filter, got bag of sand)
5Stainless Steel Podium / Lectern2"Ada bengkok sikit" (bent in transit)
5Digital LED wall clock (jam masjid)2not working
5Skuter Elektrik Electric Scooter Seat Saddle (Xiaomi replacement)2install-manual issue (see deep-dive below)

Deep-dive: Scooter Seat Saddle (Product 1729723361282787218)

Total 59 reviews — mostly happy. Star distribution (50/59 visible): 5★ = 42, 4★ = 4, 3★ = 2, 2★ = 0, 1★ = 2.

DateCustomerOrder IDComplaintR/R filed?
26/4/2026@Mohd Khairul Anwar583650041172625096"Seat tak boleh pasang, diberi connection yg salah, sampai kene pergi kedai basikal beli connection yg baru"NO — kept item, only bad review
11/4/2026@adi_milas583352608781731100"Oi bingai mne kertas manual nk psg..." (angry, no install manual)YES — RM88.40 fully refunded as "Product doesn't match description"; shop currently appealing

R/R impact: only 1 case (RM88.40, under appeal). Both negatives are about installation/manual, NOT product defect. Product itself is fine.

Root-cause patterns

Common to BOTH shops: (1) GXT 708 visor mistinted in listing photos → both shops get same complaint. (2) Next-day delivery 0% — shipping templates not enabled for next-day on either shop.

MurahYa-specific (4 patterns):

  • DOA on big-ticket electronics — scooters / hoverboards / e-bikes shipping defective (~13 of 133, 10%). Either supplier batch issue OR transit damage to heavy items.
  • Wrong colour / wrong item shipped — black ordered → grey received; pool filter ordered → bag of sand received. Picking accuracy / QC failure.
  • Listing vs reality mismatch — sizes smaller than expected, missing accessories ("set should have cover"), no manual included.
  • Damage in transit — bent podium, bent helmet visor, broken wheel bearings. Packaging too thin for heavy/metal items.

JagerHelmet-specific (1 pattern): Visor 708 listing photos show darker tint than reality → "not as expected" complaints (8 of 15 negatives). Plus full helmet has recurring spring-detachment defect.

Action plan (ranked by ROI)

JagerHelmet — biggest single fix in either shop:

  1. Re-shoot JAGER Visor 708 listing photos showing actual tint level. Update title to clarify "light tint" if accurate. Could lift rating 3.1 → ~4.3 (TikTok's own diagnosis).
  2. QC the spring/strap on full JAGER helmets before shipping.
  3. Reach out to 15 negative reviewers — offer replacement / partial refund for review update.
  4. Enable Next-Day Delivery in shipping templates.

MurahYa — 7 levers:

  1. Pre-ship QC on electric scooters / hoverboards / e-bikes (power-on + brake light + charger test).
  2. Fix picking accuracy — barcode scan or checklist at packing station.
  3. Stronger packaging for heavy/metal items (double-box / foam).
  4. Add install manual / QR card to scooter seat + similar replacement parts.
  5. Resolve 3 active product penalties + 10 product violations (Account Health > Violation records).
  6. CS chat training — quality of replies (chat sat 63.64% despite fast 0.28h response).
  7. Enable Next-Day Delivery in shipping templates.

Result

Audit only — no DB / shop / listing changes made. Full report delivered to user inline. User now has actionable, prioritised fix list with TikTok's own diagnosis-flag confirming JagerHelmet rating could move +1.2 points by tackling the single Visor 708 SKU.

▶ 30/4 Created tiktokrraudit Task Scheduler entry — runs daily 10:15 AM MYT Mon-Sat (skip Sunday); spawns Claude Code locally with full FOLLOW-UP + NEW sweep + auto-log + memory carry-over. Staggered after sbvariation 09:30 + parcelclaim-auto 09:45 to avoid AdsPower contention. tiktokrraudit Internal Completed

Why

User asked "create a daily morning routine for tiktokrraudit. it should run at 09:30 MYT Mon-Sat (skip Sunday since CS off)." Cloud /schedule routine rejected because tiktokrraudit needs local AdsPower + per-shop TT logged-in profiles + profile 70 webapp session, none of which are accessible to a cloud CCR agent. Switched to Windows Task Scheduler (existing pattern: ChatAudit_9AM, KinataCheck_*, ParcelClaim_Auto, SBVariation, TTRatingCheck_5PM).

Time chosen: 10:15 AM MYT (NOT user's original 09:30)

09:30 conflicts with SBVariation, 09:45 with ParcelClaim_Auto. Both use AdsPower exclusively. 10:15 is the next clean slot after parcelclaim-auto finishes (typical run ~15-30 min).

Changes (before → after)

  • scripts/tiktokrraudit.bat — before: did not exist. after: created (modeled after parcelclaim-auto.bat). Includes: AdsPower readiness check (12 retries x 10s), full Claude Code prompt with PHASE 1-7 (FOLLOW-UP + NEW + 2nd-dispute + patches + report + board log + memory save), report file gate (Kinata silent-exit guard), failure-fallback to board, BurntToast notification, screenshot cleanup. Prompt references 6 memory files: project_session_apr30_tt_rr.md, feedback_tt_rr_no_chat_cs_inference.md, feedback_tt_session_re_open_required.md, feedback_tt_rr_verify_each_id.md, feedback_tt_login_probe_wait.md, feedback_internal_logging_gap_systemic.md.
  • scripts/setup_tiktokrraudit_schedule.ps1 — before: did not exist. after: created. Trigger: Weekly DaysOfWeek=Mon,Tue,Wed,Thu,Fri,Sat at 10:15 AM. Settings: StartWhenAvailable, AllowStartIfOnBatteries, RestartCount=1, RestartInterval=15min.
  • Scheduled task TT_RR_Audit_10_15AM — before: did not exist. after: registered. State: Ready. NextRun: 1/5/2026 10:15:00 AM.

Result

Task verified registered (Get-ScheduledTask). First fire: tomorrow 1/5/2026 10:15 AM MYT. If user wants 09:30 instead, edit setup_tiktokrraudit_schedule.ps1 line 5 (-At) and re-run via powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File ...; the Unregister line in the .ps1 will safely overwrite.

Stack of scheduled morning tasks (current order)

  • 09:00 MYT — ChatAudit_9AM (chataudit.bat)
  • 09:30 MYT — SBVariation
  • 09:45 MYT — ParcelClaim_Auto (parcelclaim-auto.bat)
  • 10:15 MYT — TT_RR_Audit_10_15AM (tiktokrraudit.bat) — NEW
  • 17:00 MYT — TTRatingCheck_5PM (checkttrating.bat)

Google Sheet TIKTOK tab updated rows 329-341 with date 30/04/2026 + 7 RED highlights applied. 5 shops failing chat satisfaction target, 2 shops over avg response time target. checkttrating TikTok Completed

  • 7 RED highlights applied: G329 (Adelmar avgTime), I330 (Das Nature sat), I335 (JagerArmor sat), G336 (JagerHelmet avgTime), I337 (KarlMobel sat), I338 (Murahya sat), I339 (Valuesnap sat)

Pattern observations

  • 5 shops failing Chat Satisfaction target (â¥70%): Das Nature 50%, JagerArmor 0%, KarlMobel 54.55%, Murahya 64.86%, Valuesnap 50%. Possible systemic issue with chat-satisfaction-survey response handling across multiple shops.
  • 2 shops over Avg Response Time target (<1h): Adelmar 2.42h, JagerHelmet 1.57h.
  • JagerArmor 0% chatSat: likely insufficient sample size, but worth verifying.

Why scheduler failed at 17:00

schedule-log timestamps were blank (PowerShell Get-Date format quirk). Pattern matches "fired but failed silently" — likely AdsPower busy with active Claude session or login_expired cascade hit early-out. Tomorrow's TTRatingCheck_5PM bat now has carry-over read + failure-fallback to board, so even silent fails will surface.

Bottom line

13/13 shops captured. 7 red flags surfaced and highlighted in sheet. CS team should investigate the 5-shop chat-satisfaction-failure pattern + 2-shop avg-response-time issue.

ð ADDENDUM 2 (after second user pushback) — ESCALATE flags retracted

User clarification: "583156095936594996 - still in dispute, 583364130607760665, 583409594938328506 all same." All 3 cases are still actively in dispute on TT side — CS may have engaged TT live chat without internal logging (same pattern as C1305 where 2nd dispute was filed without remark patch). Internal-logging absence â  CS inaction.

  • C1235 RM355.05 — ESCALATE flag RETRACTED. Patched again with corrective note. Status: still actively in dispute, monitor only.
  • C1230 RM31.80 — ESCALATE flag RETRACTED. Patched. Still actively in dispute, monitor only.
  • C1269 RM30.38 — ESCALATE flag RETRACTED. Patched. Still actively in dispute, monitor only.

Lesson: Don't infer "no CS chat" from absence of chat cs string in webapp remarks. Internal log is systemically incomplete (per feedback_internal_logging_gap_systemic.md); default to "still active, monitor" rather than "escalate" when absence is the only signal.

▶ 30/4 EOD ADDENDUM — TTRatingCheck_5PM (today 17:00) bat ALSO patched. Yesterday's run failed (exit code 1). Today's run will use new prompt with carry-over read + WhatsApp removed + failure-fallback to board. checkttrating TikTok Completed

Found while answering "any else i missed?"

The 5th scheduled task TTRatingCheck_5PM (runs checkttrating.bat at 17:00 daily) was missed in my earlier audit pass. Yesterday's run failed (exit code 1). Today's run is in <2 hours. Patched now to match the other 4 bats.

Changes (before → after)

  • Carry-over read: prompt now reads most recent prior ttrating-report-*.md first; flags any shop that breached SAME metric as prior run as "CARRY-OVER BREACH" with delta
  • WhatsApp removed: per QR-blocker rule (was "send WhatsApp summary report directly")
  • Failure-fallback to board: NOTIFY_FAIL branch now posts a single fail entry to board before exit
  • FAIL_CODE captured: ERRORLEVEL captured to local var to survive subsequent commands

Now ALL 5 scheduled .bats are uniformly patched

  • chataudit.bat (09:10) — carry-over + DEEP-VERIFY + fallback ✔
  • checksbvariation.bat (09:30) — carry-over + watchlist + fallback ✔
  • parcelclaim-auto.bat (09:45) — carry-over + 18s/cookie/API probe + fallback ✔
  • checkkinataorder.bat (12:00 + 16:30) — carry-over + STALE flag + fallback ✔
  • checkttr state.json's known seller_idsNOTIFY_FAIL branch now calls 2nd Claude to post fail entry to board before exit /b 1 checksbvariation.batReads project_session_apr29_close.md + project_checksbvariation_expansion_24apr.md + state.json + most-recent prior report; flags any reappearing case as 'WATCHLIST HIT'NOTIFY_FAIL branch now posts fail entry to board checkkinataorder.batReads most-recent prior kinata-report-*.md + reference_kinata_profile_id.md; cross-refs any To-Process orders that still appear in this run as STALENOTIFY_FAIL branch now posts fail entry to board

    WhatsApp removed (per `feedback_skip_wa_send_status.md`)

    Three of the four bats had WhatsApp send instructions in the prompt. All three updated prompts now say "DO NOT send WhatsApp (QR-blocker)." This avoids spurious "WhatsApp sent" claims while QR-blocker on k1b44nvg persists.

    Failure-fallback flow

    • Main Claude run exits non-zero (or report file missing for parcelclaim/sbvariation/kinata)
    • Bat enters NOTIFY_FAIL branch — logs to local schedule-log + shows toast
    • NEW: bat calls a 2nd minimal Claude invocation: `claude.cmd -p "post a single fail entry to board" --allowedTools "mcp__github__*,Bash"` â adds ~30s but guarantees board records the failure
    • Bat then exits 1 to trigger Task Scheduler RestartOnFailure (where configured)

    Carry-over flow

    • At start of each run, Claude reads the listed memory files + state.json + most-recent prior report
    • Identifies pending items (yesterday's awaiting-customer cases, watchlist items, stale orders, login_expired flags vs verified_seller_ids)
    • Cross-references with today's data; flags resolved / still-pending / new
    • Reports carry-over status in summary section + board entry body

    Backup

    Original bats backed up to C:\Users\tessf\scripts\_backup-30apr-eod\ in case rollback needed.

    Tomorrow's auto-runs

    From 1/5 onwards, every scheduled task posts to board on BOTH outcomes (success or failure) AND is aware of yesterday's carry-over. User no longer needs to check schedule-log.txt or Windows toasts to know if a run failed — the board itself shows it.

    Bottom line

    Both reliability gaps closed: (1) failures now visible on board with cautious "FAILED â needs manual re-run" entries, (2) prompts now stateful with carry-over awareness so each day's run knows what's still pending from prior days.

    EOD ADDENDUM — checkttrating.bat (5th scheduled task) ALSO patched

    Found while answering "any else i missed?"

    The 5th scheduled task TTRatingCheck_5PM (runs checkttrating.bat at 17:00 daily) was missed in my earlier audit pass. Yesterday's run failed (exit code 1). Today's run is in <2 hours. Patched now to match the other 4 bats.

    Changes (before → after)

    • Carry-over read: prompt now reads most recent prior ttrating-report-*.md first; flags any shop that breached SAME metric as prior run as "CARRY-OVER BREACH" with delta
    • WhatsApp removed: per QR-blocker rule (was "send WhatsApp summary report directly")
    • Failure-fallback to board: NOTIFY_FAIL branch now posts a single fail entry to board before exit
    • FAIL_CODE captured: ERRORLEVEL captured to local var to survive subsequent commands

    Now ALL 5 scheduled .bats are uniformly patched

    • chataudit.bat (09:10) — carry-over + DEEP-VERIFY + fallback ✔
    • checksbvariation.bat (09:30) — carry-over + watchlist + fallback ✔
    • parcelclaim-auto.bat (09:45) — carry-over + 18s/cookie/API probe + fallback ✔
    • checkkinataorder.bat (12:00 + 16:30) — carry-over + STALE flag + fallback ✔
    • checkttrating.bat (17:00) — carry-over + breach delta + fallback ✔

    Why yesterday's TTRating failed

    Schedule-log shows 11 retry attempts hitting "AdsPower not ready after 2 minutes, aborting" â AdsPower was busy with another task at 17:00. With today's patches, this same failure mode will at least post a clear fail entry to the board so the user knows to manually re-run.

    Backup updated

    Original checkttrating.bat backed up to C:\Users\tessf\scripts\_backup-30apr-eod\checkttrating.bat

▶ 30/4 chataudit FINAL — Skill PATCHED + RUN + DEEP-REVIEW CORRECTION + CLASSIFIER FIX. 282 chats / 5 cs accs swept. 44 raw flags → deep-verify confirmed ALL had agent reply → 0 real misses. Classifier fixed (full-panel scan + body-name regex + MANDATORY DEEP-VERIFY PROTOCOL) so tomorrow's 09:10 auto-run produces accurate results. 14 unresolved-yesterday: 9 RESOLVED + 4 awaiting + 1 mahmoudsaeed081 phone-forward pending. cs3 NO_PANEL 20: all RESOLVED. chataudit chataudit_crosscheck Shopee MY + SG Completed

Session deliverables (3 phases)

Phase 1 — Skill PATCH (early session): Added Section 4d FIVE NEW DETECTION PATTERNS (WRONG_CLOSER_NO_TRIGGER, MISSED_HOLDING_ONLY, CURT_REPLY, WRONG_TEMPLATE_DURING_ACTIVE, PARTIAL_REPLY) + case-insensitive Safety tip filter + .GpaQAzyZwN priority rule + Error 25.

Phase 2 — Audit run + initial board push (mid-session): Window 28/4 17:45 → 29/4 17:45 MYT swept all 5 cs accounts (282 chats). Classifier produced 44 raw flags. 14 unresolved-yesterday checked via search box (9 RESOLVED, 4 awaiting customer, 1 mahmoudsaeed081 still needs CS phone-forward). cs3 20 NO_PANEL retries all verified (18 RESOLVED + 2 awaiting). Initial board entry pushed.

Phase 3 — User pushback + DEEP-REVIEW CORRECTION + Classifier FIX (late session): User: "CS got reply la, all got reply u say no reply, wasting my time." Deep-verified each of 44 flagged chats individually. ALL 44 had agent reply. Final: 0 real CS misses today. Classifier root-caused + fixed in skill file.

Skill changes (before → after)

  • BATCH JS CLICK METHOD classifier (line ~492):
    • Before: const tail = txt.substring(txt.length - 200); hasAgent = tail.includes('-Lucy') || tail.includes('-Haja') || tail.includes('-Sofia') || tail.includes('-Sab')
    • After: full-panel scan + comprehensive regex (dash signoff + Name sini/here + Hi boss Name + sticker img check); 22 agent names tracked; output renamed HOLDING_ONLY → CANDIDATE_MISS to make explicit it's triage
  • MANDATORY DEEP-VERIFY PROTOCOL section added (after Key points): Every CANDIDATE_MISS MUST be opened individually + full panel read + 5 reply checks (dash, body-name, greeting, sticker, customer thank-you) + pre-publish 5-sample gate before report/board
  • Error 26 added: documents 30/4 100%-false-positive incident + 5 prevention rules (classifier=triage / full-panel scan / all reply patterns / pre-publish gate / cautious auto-run language)
  • Skill version stamped: *Updated 2026-04-30 EOD* footer

Tomorrow's 09:10 auto-run readiness

chataudit.bat (Windows Task Scheduler ChatAudit_910AM, WakeToRun=True, StartWhenAvailable=True) reads .claude/skills/chataudit.md at runtime. Skill fixes are live. Tomorrow's auto-run will:

  • Use full-panel scan classifier (no tail-truncation)
  • Detect agent replies via dash signoff + body-name patterns + sticker imgs
  • Run MANDATORY DEEP-VERIFY on every CANDIDATE_MISS before reporting
  • Auto-log to board with cautious language (since unattended)

Carry-over for 1/5 (CS action items)

  • mahmoudsaeed081 (cs4 MurahYa): forward corrected phone +601163865735 to courier
  • jeff9599 (cs3 KarlMobel): investigate "chin9599:main will serve you" Chat Assistant template internal name leak
  • stardustc (cs1 ValueSnap): verify customer got 4 juicer specs from "relevant team" (Haja deferred, didn't answer)
  • paulinesosman (cs1 ValueSnap): visual re-check (panel was 329 chars + 2 imgs — likely sticker reply)
  • 4 awaiting-customer: adiey90, jk7ps1zpep, mawardi.ariffin, sonic_ensem (CS asked photo/video, no reply yet) — let auto-close
  • 2 cs3 awaiting-customer: watashiwahanzdes, fatimahhhh_100 (CS asked clarification, awaiting customer)

Outputs saved

  • Skill: C:\Users\tessf\.claude\skills\chataudit.md (Section 4d + Error 25 + Error 26 + classifier fix + DEEP-VERIFY protocol)
  • Master report: Documents\chataudit-reports\chataudit-summary-Thu-30-4.md (CORRECTED with deep-review verdict)
  • Per-account: Documents\chataudit-reports\30-4-batches\cs[1-5]-today-flags.md
  • Carry-over: 30-4-batches\14-cases-followup.md, cs3-20-nopanel-retry.md
  • Memory: project_session_apr30_chataudit.md + feedback_chataudit_deep_review_required.md
  • Board: 3 commits this session (initial + correction + final classifier-fix)

Bottom line

Session COMPLETED. 0 real CS misses today across 282 chats. CS team handled all chats with agent replies. Skill classifier fixed so tomorrow's auto-run is reliable. 1 carry-over CS action (mahmoudsaeed081 phone-forward) and 3 minor follow-ups noted.

Disposition breakdown (25 cases since 100873):

    • 100873 Lovento — buyerDecision Cancelled (stale 6d).
  • MY uncontacted Cat D — 3 cases (bot didn't send despite trace): 100886 ValueSnap (CirclePB), 100885 MurahYa (GSL-WARM-LIGHT), 100880 Karlmobel (OFFICE-CHAIR-HR-WHLS-BLK). All 3 showed SiteGiant mismatch — see warehouse notes below.
  • MY uncontacted Cat E — 8 cases (trace bot fail, sku:[]+productName:null): 100897 das.nature2, 100896 das.nature, 100892 Hiranai, 100887 MasonGym, 100884 MurahYa, 100883 BahEmas, 100877 Hiranai, 100875 Emas Gift. Per 23/4 lesson: IT actively investigating bot — no Jira raised. Tracked as "Pending IT Investigation".
  • TT messages SENT (2) — user-approved:
    • 100889 TT DasNature, order 583732707119695088, buyer fieyqalya (was Black Type-A) — sent verbatim SHOPEE_MY_OFFER_CHANGE template offering Red Type-A or Blue Type-A. Banned-word regex passed (no cancel/cancellation/batal/refund). PATCH /api/sb-variation/100889 → contactSent: false → true, csRemarks updated. Sent 12:11 MYT via TT Shop Chat.
    • 100888 TT DasNature, order 583733178171425806, buyer _nrsyamimi92 (was Silver Type-A) — sent verbatim SHOPEE_MY_OFFER_CHANGE template offering Red Type-A or Blue Type-A. Banned-word regex passed. PATCH /api/sb-variation/100888 → contactSent: false → true, csRemarks updated. Sent 12:13 MYT via TT Shop Chat.
    • Send path note: TT order-detail chat icon (span[data-tid="im.action.order_detail_entrance"]) opens via window.open to /chat?...&token=...; popup-blocked path required navigating same tab to the captured URL. Pulse AI Seller Assistant modal hijacks the icon click visually, but the underlying window.open still fires the chat URL. Approach should be added to skill notes for future runs.
  • SG Kinata — 3 cases user contacted manually + csRemarks PATCHed (12:25 MYT): 100895 + 100894 + 100893 Kinata SG (all No Stock). User confirmed she contacted buyers via SG chat directly, but the SG seller-center phone-icon toggle is unclickable due to a known SG UI bug — IT ticket open. csRemarks added to all 3 cases on user's behalf so audit history is correct (contactSent flag remains false until backend fix).
  • Lazada messages SENT (2) — user-approved:
    • 100891 Laz MurahYa, order 502299807220030, buyer qiu.wong (was Black 38-39, 3-item slipper order) — sent verbatim SHOPEE_MY_OFFER_CHANGE template offering Blue 38-39 or Yellow 38-39. Banned-word regex passed. PATCH /api/sb-variation/100891 → contactSent: false → true, csRemarks updated. Sent 12:35 MYT via Lazada IM.
    • 100890 Laz MurahYa, order 505504546526329, buyer Mary (was Bracket Slide swimming pool) — sent verbatim SHOPEE_MY_NO_STOCK template. Banned-word regex passed. PATCH /api/sb-variation/100890 → contactSent: false → true, csRemarks updated. Sent 12:42 MYT via Lazada IM.
    • Lazada send path discovery: button.chat-button on order detail calls window.open('/apps/im/window?isWindowOpen=true&buyerId=<id>&orderId=<id>'). Same-tab navigate to the captured URL opens the seller-initiated buyer chat directly. Textarea = textarea.message-textarea (placeholder "Type message here, Enter to send message"), send via Enter keydown event. Pattern is identical to TT chat but with different URL params. Recorded for skill notes.
    • AdsPower MCP dropped twice during Lazada flow — user reconnected via /mcp; sends resumed cleanly with no message duplication.

  • GSL-WARM-LIGHT (case 100885 / order 260427VAKKP85N) â Warehouse reported no stock, but SiteGiant still shows 242 on hand. MAJOR MISMATCH — RETRACTED 12:28 MYT: bot Cat E mis-trace. Order had 2 items (lamp + mouse); bot tagged the lamp instead of the actual OOS mouse. Real OOS = MW-BLK SoH=0. Warehouse was correct, bot was wrong. No physical investigation needed.

Correction — 3 TT profiles were NOT logged out (user pushback ~12:30 MYT)

  • What I claimed (PM Pass #2): profiles 54 TT Adelmar, 56 TT Hiranai, 64 TT MurahYa redirected to /account/login → flagged login_expired.
  • User said: "from my side, the 3 shops wasnt logout, can u check properly".
  • Root cause: my probe used a 4-second post-navigation wait. TT seller portal does multiple bounces during cold load (auth refresh, region pick, etc.) — URL transiently includes /account/login within first ~10s even on logged-in profiles. Re-probed with 15–18s wait and a global_seller_id_unified_seller_env cookie check.
  • Correction result — all 3 ARE logged in:
    • 54 TT Adelmar: seller_id 7495045783304768313. R/R 71/0 within cutoff. FD 23/0 within cutoff. 0 candidates.
